title: Capturing electron correlation at mean-field cost: Assessment of i-DMFT and the underlying correlation conjecture
summary: Accurately treating strong electron correlation in quantum chemistry typically requires multireference wave-function methods with steep computational scaling. The recently proposed i-DMFT method promises near configuration-interaction accuracy at mean-field cost by invoking an empirical linear relation between correlation energy and entropy (Collins' conjecture), whose validity remains unclear. We systematically assess this relation across a range of di- and polyatomic molecules, including diverse bond types, third-row elements, different types of geometric distortions, and excited states. We find that the conjectured linearity holds for bond-breaking processes dominated by electron redistribution within orbital pairs, but breaks down for heterolytic dissociation and excited states. In simple molecules, i-DMFT provides a reasonable description of total energies, but does not reliably reproduce reduced density matrices or individual energy components. It further degrades in more complex cases such as ethylene. Based on these results, we formulate criteria for the validity of the conjecture and outline implications for entropy-based reduced density matrix functionals.

AI.tldr: 本文系统评估了i-DMFT方法中核心的线性关联假设（Collins猜想），发现该假设仅在特定键解离过程中成立，而在异裂解离和激发态中失效。i-DMFT虽能描述总能量，但在约化密度矩阵、能量分量及复杂分子（如乙烯）中表现不佳。作者据此提出了该假设的适用范围标准。
AI.motivation: 验证i-DMFT方法中提出的相关能与熵之间的经验线性关系（Collins猜想）的有效性，澄清其适用范围和局限性。
AI.method: 对一系列双原子和多原子分子进行系统评估，包括不同键型、第三行元素、各种几何畸变类型以及激发态，检验相关能与熵之间的线性关系。
AI.result: 线性关系在轨道对内的电子重分布主导的断键过程中成立，但在异裂解离和激发态中失效。i-DMFT能合理描述简单分子的总能量，但无法可靠重现约化密度矩阵或单个能量分量，在复杂分子（如乙烯）中表现更差。
AI.conclusion: 提出了Collins猜想有效性的标准，并概述了对基于熵的约化密度矩阵泛函的启示。

title: Improving Molecular Force Fields with Minimal Temporal Information
summary: Accurate prediction of energy and forces for 3D molecular systems is one of fundamental challenges at the core of AI for Science applications. Many powerful and data-efficient neural networks predict molecular energies and forces from single atomic configurations. However, one crucial aspect of the data generation process is rarely considered while learning these models i.e. Molecular Dynamics (MD) simulation. MD simulations generate time-ordered trajectories of atomic positions that fluctuate in energy and explore regions of the potential energy surface (e.g., under standard NVE/NVT ensembles), rather than being constructed to steadily lower the potential energy toward a minimum as in geometry relaxations. This work explores a novel way to leverage MD data, when available, to improve the performance of such predictors. We introduce a novel training strategy called FRAMES, that use an auxiliary loss function for exploiting the temporal relationships within MD trajectories. Counter-intuitively, on two atomistic benchmarks and a synthetic system we observe that minimal temporal information, captured by pairs of just two consecutive frames, is often sufficient to obtain the best performance, while adding longer trajectory sequences can introduce redundancy and degrade performance. On the widely used MD17 and ISO17 benchmarks, FRAMES significantly outperforms its Equiformer baseline, achieving highly competitive results in both energy and force accuracy. Our work not only presents a novel training strategy which improves the accuracy of the model, but also provides evidence that for distilling physical priors of atomic systems, more temporal data is not always better.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FRAMES训练策略，通过利用MD轨迹中连续两帧的时间关系作为辅助损失函数，显著提升了分子能量和力的预测精度，并发现更长的时序信息反而会降低性能。
AI.motivation: 现有图神经网络预测分子能量和力时，通常只从单个原子构型学习，忽略了分子动力学(MD)模拟生成的时间有序轨迹数据。作者希望探索如何有效利用MD轨迹中的时序信息来提升预测器性能。
AI.method: 提出FRAMES训练策略，引入辅助损失函数利用MD轨迹中的时间关系。具体使用连续两帧（即一对相邻时间步的原子构型）作为最小时间信息单位进行训练。
AI.result: 在MD17和ISO17基准上，FRAMES显著优于Equiformer基线；发现仅需两个连续帧即可获得最佳性能，更长轨迹序列反而带来冗余并降低性能。
AI.conclusion: FRAMES是一种有效利用MD时序数据的训练策略，并能从更少的时间信息中获得更好的性能，表明在提炼原子系统的物理先验时，更多时序数据并不总是更好。

title: An efficient method based on the evolutionary center algorithm for optimizing chemical-diffusive models for flame acceleration and DDT
comment: Manuscript with 13 figures, 7 tables, and appendix
summary: This paper presents an efficient method based on Evolutionary Center Algorithm (ECA) for accurately and efficiently determining the optimal reaction and diffusion parameters for Chemical-Diffusive Models (CDM) to simulate flame acceleration (FA) and deflagration-to-detonation transition (DDT). The proposed method leverages the global search capability of the ECA and the local optimization strength of the Nelder-Mead (NM) algorithm. The hybrid approach (ECA-NM) can efficiently optimize CDM parameters that are capable of accurately reproducing the major properties of combustion waves. The CDMs for premixed flames and detonations of hydrogen in air or oxygen were developed using the present ECA-NM method and validated against canonical tests of combustion waves and previous experiments of FA and DDT. The results show that the major flame and detonation properties calculated using the developed CDMs match those obtained from detailed chemical reaction mechanisms over a wide range of equivalence ratio. The simulated FA and DDT in a channel also agree qualitatively and quantitatively with experiments in terms of complex flame instabilities (e.g., tulip and distorted tulip flames), flame displacement speed, and detonation occurrence. In addition, detailed comparisons to the traditional genetic algorithm demonstrate that the developed ECA-NM method diminishes the global error by four orders of magnitude while reducing the computational cost by two orders of magnitude. This work provides a significantly efficient method for developing chemical-diffusive models that allows quantitative multi-scale simulations of transient flames and detonations in complex scenarios.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于进化中心算法(ECA)与Nelder-Mead(NM)混合优化的方法(ECA-NM)，用于高效准确地确定化学扩散模型(CDM)的最佳反应和扩散参数，以模拟火焰加速(FA)和爆燃转爆轰(DDT)。该方法将全局误差降低了四个数量级，计算成本降低了两个数量级，并在氢气燃烧测试中得到了实验验证。
AI.motivation: 现有的CDM参数优化方法（如遗传算法）计算成本高、精度有限，难以高效且准确地确定最优参数，从而限制了多尺度燃烧模拟的定量准确性。
AI.method: 将进化中心算法(ECA)的全局搜索能力与Nelder-Mead(NM)算法的局部优化能力相结合，形成混合ECA-NM方法，用于优化CDM中的反应和扩散参数。
AI.result: 1) 基于ECA-NM开发的CDM在宽当量比范围内，计算的火焰和爆轰特性与详细化学反应机理结果吻合；2) 模拟的FA和DDT在火焰不稳定性、火焰传播速度和爆轰发生等方面与实验定性定量一致；3) 与传统遗传算法相比，全局误差降低四个数量级，计算成本降低两个数量级。
AI.conclusion: ECA-NM方法为开发CDM提供了一种显著高效的途径，能够实现对复杂场景中瞬态火焰和爆轰的定量多尺度模拟。

title: A Statistical-Mechanical Model for Dipolar Chain Formation
summary: Dipolar fluids are known to exhibit complex self-assembly at low temperatures, yet a compact thermodynamic description of their aggregate statistics has remained elusive. Using molecular dynamics simulations of Stockmayer particles with a purely repulsive WCA core, we show that over broad regions of the ($ρ$, $T$) phase space the chain-size distribution follows an exponential decay with characteristic size $s_0$. Within this regime, we find that $s_0$ can be accurately described by an effective thermodynamic potential $φ$ that incorporates bonding energy, a crowding penalty, and translational entropy. Identifying deviations from this ideal scaling provides a further division of the phase space into four regions. Therefore, our results locate a regime of relatively simple chain statistics and offer an alternative regime-based perspective on dipolar self-assembly.

AI.tldr: 本文通过Stockmayer粒子的分子动力学模拟，发现偶极流体在低温下的链尺寸分布呈指数衰减，并提出了一个包含键能、拥挤惩罚和平移熵的有效热力学势φ来精确描述特征尺寸s₀，从而将相空间划分为四个区域。
AI.motivation: 偶极流体在低温下表现出复杂的自组装行为，但缺乏简洁的热力学描述来刻画其聚集统计特性。
AI.method: 对具有纯排斥WCA核的Stockmayer粒子进行分子动力学模拟，分析(ρ, T)相空间中链尺寸分布的统计规律。
AI.result: 链尺寸分布呈现指数衰减，特征尺寸s₀可由有效热力学势φ精确描述；根据与理想标度的偏差将相空间划分为四个区域。
AI.conclusion: 研究定位了偶极自组装中链统计行为相对简单的区域，提供了一种基于相空间区域的视角来理解偶极流体的自组装行为。

title: Perfect spin nonreciprocity in gated superconducting altermagnetic heterostructures
summary: We consider a superconducting altermagnet heterostructure and demonstrate that the interplay between altermagnetism and a selective filter of transverse momentum channels enables perfect nonreciprocal spin-polarized currents. We demonstrate that this nonreciprocity manifests in both local and nonlocal spin currents, signalling the emergence of directionally selective local and nonlocal spin behaviors. We show that the selective filter of transverse momentum channels is realized by gating a finite normal region between the superconducting altermagnet and the metallic reservoir, which then directionally selects transport channels that match the momentum-dependent spin-split superconducting altermagnetic states, allowing for nonreciprocal spin-polarized currents. We discover that the local and nonlocal spin nonreciprocity features a highly tunable polarity and nearly perfect quality factors, respectively, which is achieved by means of gate voltages and by varying the length of the finite region. Moreover, we find that local and nonlocal charge currents also develop a nonreciprocal behavior, whose quality factors can also reach perfect values. In all cases, the spin and charge currents are sensitive to variations of the altermagnetic field, a functional dependence that can be exploited to identify the type of altermagnetism. Our findings put forward an electrically controllable route towards nonreciprocal superconducting spintronic devices based on altermagnets.

AI.tldr: 本文研究超导交变磁体异质结构，通过横向动量通道的选择性滤波实现了完美的非互易自旋极化电流，并展示了局域和非局域自旋/电荷电流的高度可调性与近乎完美的品质因子，为基于交变磁体的非互易超导自旋电子器件提供了电可控路径。
AI.motivation: 探索超导与交变磁体协同作用下的非互易自旋输运机制，实现方向性选择的自旋极化电流，为超导自旋电子器件提供新的物理基础。
AI.method: 在超导交变磁体与金属库之间构筑有限正常区域，通过门电压调控实现横向动量通道的选择性滤波，使其与动量依赖的自旋劈裂超导交变磁态匹配，从而产生方向性选择的非互易自旋极化电流。
AI.result: 局域和非局域自旋电流均展现出高度可调的非互易性（极性可调、品质因子近乎完美）；局域和非局域电荷电流也具有非互易行为，品质因子可达完美值；所有电流均对交变磁场变化敏感。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种基于门电压电控的非互易超导自旋电子器件新方案，可灵活调控自旋/电荷电流的非互易特性，并可通过电流对交变磁场的依赖关系识别交变磁体类型。

title: Melting temperature shifts from quantum fluctuations in generalized Wigner crystals
summary: It is generally believed that quantum fluctuations collaborate with thermal fluctuations, effectively reducing transition temperatures (e.g. for melting of charge order). We show that this is not always the case and that the interplay between quantum and thermal fluctuations can be competitive. We find excellent motivation for addressing this thanks to the discovery of correlated insulating "generalized Wigner crystal" (GWC) states in hetero-bilayer transition metal dichalcogenide (WS$_2$/WSe$_2$) moiré systems [Y. Xu, et al., Nature 587, 214-218 (2020)]. We account for the impact of quantum effects on the melting temperature of GWCs, carrying out finite temperature Lanczos calculations on an extended Hubbard model on the triangular lattice (both with a double-gate screened potential, and the nearest neighbor model) for multiple electron densities. We show that quantum effects capture the shift relative to the classical estimates, which in some cases are more than 50 percent off from the experimental values. Then building on these numerical findings, we provide a qualitative picture that clarifies that while quantum melting of GWC (by increasing the bandwidth) naturally softens the ground state order parameter, it does not always decrease the melting temperature; conversely it can increase it. To do so we employ a finite temperature perturbation theory, treating the kinetic energy perturbatively on top of a classical Wigner crystal. Our predictions should be observable in future experiments where the bandwidth can be tuned.

AI.tldr: 本文研究表明量子涨落并不总是与热涨落协同降低转变温度，反而可能与热涨落竞争，在某些情况下会提高广义维格纳晶体的熔化温度，这与传统认知相反。
AI.motivation: 传统观点认为量子涨落与热涨落协同降低转变温度，但过渡金属硫化物异质双层moiré系统中广义维格纳晶体的发现提供了契机，促使作者重新审视量子与热涨落的相互作用机制。
AI.method: 对三角晶格扩展Hubbard模型（双栅屏蔽势和最近邻模型）进行有限温度Lanczos计算，并结合有限温度微扰论（将动能作为经典维格纳晶体的微扰）进行定性分析。
AI.result: 量子效应在部分情况下对熔化温度的修正超过50%；量子涨落通过增加带宽软化基态序参量，但并不总是降低熔化温度，反而可能提升熔化温度。
AI.conclusion: 量子涨落与热涨落存在竞争关系，未来在可调带宽的实验中应能观测到量子效应提升转变温度的反常现象。

title: Topological Edge States Emerging from Twisted Moiré Bands
summary: We study twisted bilayer WSe$_2$ within a continuum moiré model and introduce a method for treating finite geometries directly in the continuum framework, overcoming limitations associated with momentum-space formulations and Wannier obstructions. By projecting a confinement potential onto bulk moiré eigenstates, we obtain a real-space description of edge physics without lattice models. Applying this approach to nanoribbons, we demonstrate chiral edge modes consistent with bulk Chern numbers and reveal their moiré-scale character. In the magic-angle regime, these states are strongly localized, exhibit layer-polarized counter-propagating modes, and are electrically tunable via a displacement field, enabling control of localization, hybridization, and topological transitions. Our results establish a general framework for boundary physics in topological moiré materials.

AI.tldr: 本文针对扭曲双层WSe₂，提出了一种在连续体moiré模型中直接处理有限几何结构的方法，揭示了纳米带中的手征边缘态及其moiré尺度特征，并在魔角区域展示了强局域化、层极化反向传播模式及电场可调性，为拓扑moiré材料的边界物理提供了通用框架。
AI.motivation: 现有连续体moiré模型受限于动量空间表述和Wannier obstruction，难以直接研究有限几何结构（如边缘态）的边界物理，而传统晶格模型又无法捕捉moiré尺度的精细特征。作者旨在克服这些限制，建立一个无需晶格模型即可研究moiré材料边界物理的通用方法。
AI.method: 在连续体moiré模型中，通过将限制势（confinement potential）投影到体态moiré本征态上，直接在连续体框架内获得边缘物理的实空间描述，从而避免使用晶格模型。将此方法应用于纳米带结构，研究边缘态的性质。
AI.result: 成功揭示了纳米带中的手征边缘态，其行为与体态Chern数一致，并展现了moiré尺度的特征。在魔角区域，边缘态高度局域化，呈现层极化的反向传播模式，且可以通过位移电场调控其局域化程度、杂化行为及拓扑相变。
AI.conclusion: 该工作建立了一个研究拓扑moiré材料边界物理的通用框架，突破了现有方法的局限性，为探索和调控moiré体系中的边缘态提供了新工具。

title: Organosilane-functionalized hydrothermal-derived coatings on titanium alloys for hydrophobization and corrosion protection
summary: This work focuses on the structure, wettability and corrosion behaviors of Ti-6Al-4V alloy after roughening treatments in different concentrations of NaOH aqueous solutions followed by low surface energy hexadecyltrimethoxysilane (HDTMS) coating. In this regard, scanning electron microscopy, contact angle measurements, potentiodynamic polarization and electrochemical impedance spectroscopy were used to characterize the samples. In contrast to hydrophilicity caused by the hydrothermal alkaline treatments, the subsequent HDTMS coating donated considerable hydrophobicity. Typically, the highest sessile water contact angle (about 147 deg) was obtained for the sample treated in 3 molar NaOH solution followed by the HDTMS coating. In addition, the alkaline treatment reduced the corrosion resistance of the surface in a NaCl aqueous solution; however, the HDTMS hydrophobization process improved it significantly. It is eventually concluded that the coupled use of alkaline treatment and HDTMS functionalization can be further considered for moisture-exposed applications of Ti-based alloys.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了Ti-6Al-4V合金经不同浓度NaOH溶液粗化处理后再涂覆低表面能HDTMS涂层后的结构、润湿性和耐腐蚀行为。3M NaOH处理加HDTMS涂层获得了约147°的最大接触角，碱性处理虽降低了耐蚀性，但HDTMS疏水化处理显著提升了耐蚀性。两者联合使用可用于钛基合金的防潮应用。
AI.motivation: 针对钛合金在潮湿环境中易受腐蚀的问题，探索通过碱性粗化处理与疏水涂层相结合的方法来改善其表面润湿性和耐腐蚀性能，为Ti-6Al-4V合金在潮湿环境中的应用提供技术方案。
AI.method: 1）不同浓度NaOH水溶液对Ti-6Al-4V合金进行水热碱性粗化处理；2）随后在粗糙表面涂覆低表面能HDTMS涂层；3）采用SEM、接触角测量、动电位极化和电化学阻抗谱进行表征。
AI.result: 1）碱性处理使表面亲水，HDTMS涂层后转变为显著疏水；2）3M NaOH+HDTMS处理获得最高接触角约147°；3）碱性处理降低耐蚀性，但HDTMS疏水化显著提升耐蚀性。
AI.conclusion: 碱性粗化处理与HDTMS疏水功能化联合使用可显著改善Ti-6Al-4V合金的疏水性和耐腐蚀性能，值得在钛基合金的防潮应用场景中进一步考虑。

title: Scaling at Chiral Clock Criticality via Entanglement Renormalization
summary: We employ the Multiscale Entanglement Renormalization Ansatz (MERA) tensor network to investigate a critical line of continuous quantum phase transitions of the $\mathbb{Z}_3$ chiral clock model. This critical line is believed to be described by a slow renormalization group flow from the 3-state Potts fixed point to another fixed point that features anisotropic scaling of space and time. We use the variational principle to construct a MERA representation of the model's ground state, from which we obtain the ground state energy and the set of scaling operators and their scaling dimensions. These scaling dimensions determine the critical exponents of the model, and we study these critical exponents and other scaling data as a function of the model's chiral parameter. We find a set of effective scaling data that smoothly varies starting from the Potts data as the chiral parameter is increased. Within the context of our approach, we discuss how this result may nevertheless be consistent with the two fixed point hypothesis provided the renormalization group flow is sufficiently slow. Our findings demonstrate MERA's effectiveness in capturing the complex low-energy physics of the chiral clock model and in extracting field theory data for an anisotropic continuum theory.

AI.tldr: 本文利用MERA张量网络研究$\mathbb{Z}_3$手征时钟模型的连续量子相变临界线，发现有效临界指数从3态Potts模型数据随手征参数平滑变化，并讨论了与双固定点假设的一致性。
AI.motivation: 理解$\mathbb{Z}_3$手征时钟模型的临界行为，特别是验证其临界线是否由3态Potts固定点流向另一个具有各向异性标度的固定点的缓慢重整化群流所描述。
AI.method: 采用多尺度纠缠重整化拟设(MERA)张量网络，通过变分原理构建模型基态的MERA表示，从中提取基态能量、标度算子和标度维度，进而确定临界指数。
AI.result: 发现有效标度数据随手征参数从Potts数据平滑变化；若重整化群流足够缓慢，该结果仍可能与双固定点假设一致。
AI.conclusion: MERA能有效捕获手征时钟模型的复杂低能物理，并能提取各向异性连续场论的数据，展示了张量网络方法在量子临界现象研究中的强大能力。

title: VPT2 Calculations of Vibrational Energies of CH3COOC6H4COOH Done in Seconds on a Laptop Using a Machine Learned Potential
summary: The determination of quartic force fields for use in vibrational second-order perturbation (VPT2) calculations, currently available in numerous electronic structure packages, becomes very expensive as the size of the molecule increases, especially if high-level coupled cluster theory is used. Machine-learned potentials (MLPs) for large molecules and clusters offer a viable alternative to obtain the quartic force field (QFF). Here, we report Fortran and Python software to determine the QFF and perform VPT2 calculations of energies from MLPs. We describe this software briefly and then apply it to \ce{H2O} and protonated oxalate as test cases. The Fortran software is applied to 21-atom aspirin, using a fast MLP reported by us. Despite the fact that there are 32,509 unique cubic force constants for aspirin, the computer time to calculate them using this MLP is trivial, i.e., around one minute. These results are the first quantum anharmonic ones for such a large molecule. The present protocol offers an efficient way to study quantum anharmonic effects for vibrational energies in large molecules. Currently, these are obtained overwhelmingly from classical molecular dynamics simulations, which cannot describe strong anharmonicity.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用机器学习势（MLP）获取四次力场（QFF）并进行振动二阶微扰（VPT2）计算的方法，开发了Fortran和Python软件，并在H2O、质子化草酸盐和阿司匹林（21原子）上验证。计算阿司匹林的32909个三次力常数仅需约一分钟，首次实现了大分子的量子非谐振动频率计算。
AI.motivation: 传统基于高精度耦合簇理论的四次力场计算在大分子体系中计算成本极高，而大量分子的量子非谐振动效应目前主要依赖经典分子动力学模拟，无法描述强非谐性。因此需要一种高效的方法来获得大分子的量子非谐振动能。
AI.method: 开发了Fortran和Python软件，利用机器学习势（MLP）替代传统从头算方法计算四次力场（QFF），然后进行振动二阶微扰（VPT2）计算，获得量子非谐振动能。
AI.result: 在21原子阿司匹林分子上，尽管存在32509个独特的三次力常数，使用MLP计算仅需约一分钟时间。这是首次在大分子上实现量子非谐振动计算。
AI.conclusion: 该方案提供了一种高效研究大分子量子非谐振动效应的方法，可弥补当前经典分子动力学模拟无法描述强非谐性的不足。

title: Discovery of parity-violating chiral polar-nematic charge density wave and superconductivity in kagome metals
summary: Nonmagnetic kagome metals and superconductors AV3Sb5 (A = K, Rb, Cs) host unconventional charge density wave (CDW) and superconducting (SC) phases accompanied by multiple electronic symmetry breaking. Due to the centrosymmetric crystal structure, inversion symmetry has generally been assumed to hold. Here, using scanning tunneling microscopy complemented by atomic force microscopy and optical second-harmonic generation, we directly reveal that inversion symmetry in the kagome plane is spontaneously broken in the CDW state. The mixed-parity CDW state exhibits ferroelectric dipolar and nematic quadrupolar ordered moments. The coexistence and coupling between the dipole and quadrupole favor noncollinear ferro-polar and nematic alignment that breaks all mirror symmetries and gives rise to robust electronic chirality in the 3Q CDW. The multipolar coupling to in-plane electric field enables electric field control and manipulation of the chiral polar-nematic CDW state, including its chirality. Below the SC transition, we observe parity-violating pair density modulations at both the original and the CDW lattice wavevectors. Our findings of parity-violating electronic chiral multipolar order provide microscopic insights into the magnetoelectric and nonreciprocal transport, loop current order, pairing density waves, and unconventional superconductivity in kagome metals and related quantum materials.

AI.tldr: 本研究发现Kagome金属AV3Sb5在电荷密度波态中自发打破了反演对称性，形成了混合宇称的CDW态，具有铁电偶极和向列四极有序矩，并展现出电子手性。这种手性可通过电场调控，且在超导态中观察到宇称破坏的配对密度调制。
AI.motivation: 由于AV3Sb5具有中心对称晶体结构，反演对称性通常被认为保持成立。作者旨在验证这一假设是否在CDW态中仍然成立，并探索可能的对称性破缺及其物理后果。
AI.method: 使用扫描隧道显微镜（STM）、原子力显微镜（AFM）和光学二次谐波产生（SHG）等实验技术。
AI.result: 发现CDW态中kagome平面内反演对称性自发破缺，形成混合宇称CDW态，具有铁电偶极和向列四极有序矩。偶极-四极耦合导致非共线铁电极化和向列排列，破坏所有镜像对称性，产生鲁棒的3Q CDW电子手性。电场可操控该手性。超导态中观察到宇称破坏的配对密度调制。
AI.conclusion: 宇称破坏的电子手性多极有序为理解Kagome金属中的磁电效应、非互易输运、环流序、配对密度波和非常规超导性提供了微观基础。

title: Field-Induced Selective Spin Gap Closure and Quantum Criticality in BaNd$_2$ZnS$_5$
summary: We report thermodynamic evidence for field-induced mode-selective quantum criticality in the layered rare-earth magnet BaNd2ZnS5 (BNZS). Below the Neel temperature TN = 2.9 K, spin-orbit-entangled Nd3+ moments form two symmetry-inequivalent low-energy spin-excitation modes arising from Kramers doublet physics under a magnetic field, with distinct gaps Delta_L and Delta_H. For magnetic fields applied along the [110] direction, the lower-energy gap Delta_L softens continuously and collapses at a critical field Hc ~ 2 T, while the higher-energy gap Delta_H remains gapped, leaving the system in an intermediate partially critical phase. Despite the partial nature of the criticality, thermodynamic measurements reveal a continuous quantum phase transition. The ac susceptibility shows universal scaling behavior, with chi_ac(T, H) collapsing onto a single scaling function and following chi_ac ~ T^-0.2 at criticality. A finite residual Sommerfeld coefficient gamma_0 further indicates the emergence of gapless excitations confined to a single symmetry sector near the quantum critical point. In contrast to conventional quantum criticality based on global softening of low-energy excitations, BNZS exhibits a selective breakdown of Kramers-doublet excitations due to its strong anisotropic interactions. Our results establish BNZS as a spin-orbit-coupled rare-earth magnet where quantum criticality is not global but mode-selective, with anisotropic interactions enabling independent criticality in distinct excitation sectors.

AI.tldr: 该论文报道了在层状稀土磁体BaNd2ZnS5中发现的场致模式选择性量子临界性，即仅在某一自旋激发模式中出现能隙软化而另一模式保持有隙，形成部分临界相，并通过热力学测量和标度行为证实了这种非常规量子临界现象。
AI.motivation: 探索在强各向异性相互作用的稀土磁体中是否存在不同于传统全局型量子临界性的模式选择性量子临界现象。
AI.method: 对BaNd2ZnS5单晶进行热力学测量（比热、磁化率等），分析交流磁化率的普适标度行为，并提取残余索末菲系数作为量子临界点附近无能隙激发的证据。
AI.result: 在[110]方向磁场下，低能隙连续软化并在~2 T处闭合，而高能隙保持有隙；交流磁化率呈现普适标度行为，临界点处chi_ac ~ T^-0.2；残余索末菲系数gamma_0表明仅在单一对称性扇区出现无能隙激发。
AI.conclusion: BNZS展现了自旋-轨道耦合稀土磁体中非全局性的模式选择性量子临界性，各向异性相互作用使得不同激发扇区可独立进入临界状态。

title: Probing bilayer topological order with layer-resolved transport
summary: Shot noise has been used to measure fractional charges of anyons. The value of the charge imposes constraints on fractional statistics but does not determine it. This issue is particularly important in multi-component systems. For example, the zero charge of neutral anyons in bilayer graphene gives no information about their statistics at all. We propose a protocol to probe the statistics of charged and neutral anyons in multi-component systems with layer-resolved or spin-resolved noise. The protocol applies to the fractional quantum spin Hall effect in MoTe$_2$, topological states in multi-layer graphene and bilayer GaAs, and to recently discovered fractional excitons in bilayer graphene. The approach relies on the relation between statistics and the distribution of the anyon charge over the components. Information about statistics can also be extracted from a simpler measurement of the layer-resolved electric current through a narrow constriction in a Hall bar even in the presence of long-range interactions and other non-universal effects.

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用层分辨或自旋分辨噪声来探测多组分系统中带电及中性任意子的分数统计，解决了传统散粒噪声只能测量电荷而无法确定统计行为的局限。该方法基于任意子电荷在组分间分布与统计特性之间的关系，并可通过霍尔巴中窄收缩处的层分辨电流测量实现，在长程相互作用等非普适效应下仍有效。
AI.motivation: 传统散粒噪声只能测量任意子的分数电荷，但分数电荷并不唯一决定分数统计，尤其在多组分系统（如双层石墨烯中的中性任意子电荷为零，完全无法提供统计信息）中这一问题尤为突出。因此需要一种能够直接探测任意子统计特性的实验方案。
AI.method: 提出利用层分辨或自旋分辨噪声来探测多组分系统中任意子的分数统计。核心思想是任意子的统计行为与其电荷在多个组分（层/自旋）间的分布存在内在关联。方案可应用于MoTe₂中的分数量子自旋霍尔效应、多层石墨烯和双层GaAs中的拓扑态，以及双层石墨烯中的分数激子。此外，还可通过霍尔巴中窄收缩处的层分辨电流测量来提取统计信息，且该方法对长程相互作用等非普适效应具有鲁棒性。
AI.result: 建立了多组分系统中任意子分数统计与电荷组分分布之间的定量关系，提供了通过层/自旋分辨噪声测量来区分不同任意子统计行为的可行路径，且证明了该方案在非理想实验条件下仍然有效。
AI.conclusion: 层/自旋分辨噪声测量可以突破传统散粒噪声仅测量分数电荷的局限，直接探测多组分系统中任意子的分数统计，包括电荷为零的中性任意子。该方案适用于多种实验体系，且通过更简单的层分辨电流测量即可实现，具有广泛的实验可行性。

title: Griffiths-like phase, spin-phonon coupling, and exchange-bias in the disordered double perovskite GdSrCoMnO$_{6}$
summary: We report structural, magnetic, and Raman studies of the disordered double perovskite GdSrCoMnO$_{6}$~(GSCM). DC magnetization shows a ferromagnetic transition at $T_{C} \approx 153$~K. The inverse susceptibility exhibits a downturn above $T_{C}$ and is consistent with a Griffiths-like regime extending up to $T_{G} \approx 172$~K. Raman measurements show a deviation of the phonon frequency from the anharmonic background near the magnetic-ordering region, consistent with spin-phonon coupling. AC susceptibility indicates slow magnetic dynamics below the freezing temperature $T_{f} \approx 30$~K. These results point to magnetic inhomogeneity generated by the random distribution of mixed-valence Co and Mn ions and by the resulting competition between ferromagnetic and antiferromagnetic interactions. In the low-temperature regime, an exchange-bias effect is observed up to 50~K, with an exchange-bias magnitude $|H_{EB}| = 379$~Oe at 5~K. Structural disorder therefore plays an important role in the magnetic correlations, spin dynamics, and spin-lattice response of GSCM.

AI.tldr: 本文报道了无序双钙钛矿 GdSrCoMnO₆ 的结构、磁性和拉曼研究，发现其在 153 K 发生铁磁转变，存在 Griffiths 相、自旋-声子耦合、低温慢磁动力学和交换偏置效应（5 K 时 |HEB| = 379 Oe），表明结构无序主导了磁相关性、自旋动力学和自旋-晶格响应。
AI.motivation: 探究无序双钙钛矿材料 GdSrCoMnO₆ 中结构无序对磁相关性、自旋动力学和自旋-晶格响应的影响，理解混合价态 Co/Mn 离子随机分布导致的磁性不均匀性和竞争相互作用。
AI.method: 采用直流磁化、交流磁化率、拉曼光谱等实验手段，对 GdSrCoMnO₆ 样品进行结构和磁性的系统表征。
AI.result: (1) 铁磁转变温度 TC ≈ 153 K；(2) 高于 TC 的逆磁化率下降表明 Griffiths 相存在，TG ≈ 172 K；(3) 拉曼光谱显示磁有序附近声子频率偏离非谐背景，证实自旋-声子耦合；(4) AC 磁化率显示冻结温度 Tf ≈ 30 K 以下的慢磁动力学；(5) 低温观测到交换偏置效应，5 K 时 |HEB| = 379 Oe，效应持续至 50 K。
AI.conclusion: 结构无序通过混合价态 Co/Mn 离子的随机分布导致铁磁与反铁磁相互作用竞争，产生磁性不均匀性，从而显著影响 GdSrCoMnO₆ 的磁相关性、自旋动力学和自旋-晶格响应。

title: Nudged Elastic Membranes for Constructing Reduced Two-Dimensional Potential Energy Surfaces
summary: Path optimization methods have been widely used and highly successful for the analysis of chemical reactions. Yet, they can fail to capture intrinsically multidimensional features of potential energy surfaces (PES). We introduce the nudged elastic membrane method, a framework for constructing two-dimensional reduced potential-energy surfaces in chemically relevant regions of a PES using only energies and forces without requiring more costly Hessian information. The method is demonstrated for a three-dimensional prototype model and for the triplet formaldehyde molecular system. In both cases, the resulting membrane captures one-dimensional reaction-path features as well as genuinely two-dimensional structures such as a yet unreported reported second-order saddle point in the PES of triplet formaldehyde. The method further provides direct access to structures that can serve as starting points for subsequent refinement. Our results show that the method offers a practical route to exploring multidimensional PES topography beyond the single-path picture.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种称为“弹性膜方法”的新框架，用于在仅需能量和力（无需黑塞矩阵）的条件下构建二维缩减势能面，以捕捉化学反应势能面中固有的多维特征，包括一维反应路径和二维结构（如新发现的第二阶鞍点）。
AI.motivation: 传统路径优化方法虽然能有效分析化学反应，但无法捕捉势能面中固有的多维特征，因此需要一种能构建多维势能面且不依赖昂贵黑塞矩阵信息的方法。
AI.method: 提出了“弹性膜方法”，该方法仅利用能量和力信息，在势能面的化学相关区域构建二维缩减势能面，无需黑塞矩阵信息。
AI.result: 在三维原型模型和三线态甲醛分子系统上验证了方法，成功捕捉了一维反应路径特征，并发现了三线态甲醛势能面中此前未被报道的第二阶鞍点。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为探索超越单一路径图景的多维势能面地形提供了实用途径，并能为后续精细计算提供起始结构。

title: SPRAY: A smoothed particle radiation hydrodynamics code for modeling high intensity laser-plasma interactions
summary: Here we report the development of SPRAY, a massively parallel GPU accelerated, smoothed particle hydrodynamics (SPH)-based, radiation hydrodynamics (RHD) code designed specifically for simulating high intensity laser-plasma interactions. When a target is irradiated by an intense laser, highly complex fluid deformation occurs due to instabilities, which is challenging to study numerically. SPRAY is particle-based, mesh-free, and Lagrangian, which addresses numerical issues that posed difficulties to existing methods. Its SPH formulations for RHD governing equations are tailored toward accurate and reliable simulations of laser-target irradiation phenomena, and are solved via a time-dependent, flux-limited diffusion method. A new laser energy coupling module, which is based on the Wentzel-Kramers-Brillouin (WKB) approximation, is implemented with a totally mesh-free ray-tracing scheme that is applicable for arbitrary geometry and dimensions. The accuracy and reliability of the code are demonstrated with a series of benchmark problems. To the authors' knowledge, this is the first attempt to employ SPH method for simulations of laser-plasma interactions in high energy density physics research. Possible expansions to the code, such as laser beam-beam interaction modeling and more sophisticated multi-group radiation transport are left for future development.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍SPRAY——一个基于GPU加速的粒子法（SPH）辐射流体力学代码，专门用于模拟高强激光与等离子体相互作用，采用无网格射线追踪和WKB近似进行激光能量耦合，并通过基准测试验证了其准确性和可靠性。
AI.motivation: 高强激光照射靶材时，会因不稳定性产生复杂的流体变形，现有数值方法难以处理这些数值问题，因此需要一种更可靠、更精确的模拟工具。
AI.method: 采用GPU加速的SPH粒子法（无网格、拉格朗日框架），结合时变通量限扩散法求解辐射流体力学方程；基于WKB近似的无网格射线追踪方案实现激光能量耦合。
AI.result: 通过一系列基准问题验证了SPRAY代码的准确性和可靠性；这是首次将SPH方法应用于高能量密度物理中的激光-等离子体相互作用模拟。
AI.conclusion: SPRAY成功将SPH方法引入激光-等离子体相互作用领域，解决了传统方法的数值难题；未来可扩展至激光束-束相互作用建模及多群辐射输运等方向。

title: Chromatographic Peak Shape from a Stochastic-Diffusive Model with Multiple Retention Mechanisms: Analytic Time-Domain Expression and Derivatives
summary: A time-domain analytic expression for chromatographic peak shapes is derived within a stochastic-diffusive framework that incorporates axial diffusion (molecular and multipath/Eddy), finite initial spatial variance, a retention mechanism characterized by a high rate of short-duration events, and an arbitrary number of independent slow retention mechanisms, each characterized by its own rate of infrequent, long-duration events. A highly efficient evaluation scheme is derived for this expression. In the single-slow-mechanism case, it is two to four orders of magnitude faster than the previously available analytic route. Analytical derivatives with respect to all model parameters are also obtained, and each can be evaluated at computational cost comparable to that of the peak-shape expression. Illustrative fits to three literature peaks yielded full-profile RMSE values lower than those of the exponentially modified Gaussian in all tested cases, with minima ranging from 0.03 to 0.14 percent of peak height, compared with 0.43 to 5.57 percent for the reference model. Relative to the one-slow-mechanism formulation, allowing more than one slow mechanism produced a data-dependent improvement that exceeded one order of magnitude for one of the peaks.

AI.tldr: 本文在随机扩散框架下推导出色谱峰形的时域解析表达式，包含轴向扩散、有限初始空间方差、快速短时保留机制及多个独立慢速保留机制。提出的高效评估方案比传统方法快2-4个数量级，并给出所有模型参数的解析导数。拟合三个文献峰时，全轮廓RMSE仅为峰高的0.03-0.14%，远优于指数修正高斯模型的0.43-5.57%。多慢速机制相比单机制对部分峰有超一个数量级的提升。
AI.motivation: 现有色谱峰形模型（如指数修正高斯）拟合精度有限，尤其对非对称拖尾峰描述不足；同时传统解析方法计算效率低，难以处理多慢速保留机制耦合的复杂情形。
AI.method: 基于随机扩散框架建立包含轴向扩散（分子扩散和涡流扩散）、有限初始展宽、快速短时保留机制及任意多个独立慢速保留机制的时域解析模型；推导出单慢速机制下极高效的计算方案（比传统快2-4个量级）；并给出所有参数的解析导数。
AI.result: 在三个文献峰拟合中，全轮廓RMSE仅为峰高的0.03-0.14%，而指数修正高斯模型为0.43-5.57%；多慢速机制相比单机制对部分峰拟合误差降低超一个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的模型在色谱峰形拟合精度上显著优于传统指数修正高斯模型，且计算效率极高，适用于复杂多机制色谱分离的量化分析。

title: Superconductivity in bilayer La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$: A review focusing on the strong-coupling Hund's rule assisted pairing mechanism
summary: Discovery of high-$T_c$ superconductivity (SC) in the bilayer nickelate series La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$ have attracted substantial interest, providing a new platform for exploring unconventional SC. Certain experimental evidence has pointed to a correlated electronic nature, which is the driving force responsible for its high critical temperature ($T_c$). This work reviews the SC in La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$, with a particular focus on theoretical understanding of its pairing mechanism driven by this strong-coupling, Hund-assisted scenario. The electronic landscape is governed by two $E_g$-orbitals within the bilayer structure of NiO$_2$ planes. The $3d_{z^2}$ orbital is nearly half-filled and exhibits a stronger localized character, while the $3d_{x^2-y^2}$ is approximately quarter-filled and remains highly itinerant. The localized $3d_{z^2}$ orbitals experience robust interlayer hybridization, mediated by the $2p_z$ orbitals of the inner apical oxygen atoms. This hybridization generates a strong interlayer antiferromagnetic (AFM) exchange. In the strong coupling regime, Hund's rule coupling aligns the spins of the two $E_g$ orbitals on the same nickel site. The strong interlayer AFM exchange is effectively transferred to the itinerant $3d_{x^2-y^2}$ orbital, generating an effective coupling $J_{\perp}$ within this orbital. This mechanism is captured by a minimal strong-coupling bilayer $t$-$J$-$J_{\perp}$ model for the $3d_{x^2-y^2}$ band. Driven by $J_{\perp}$, $3d_{x^2-y^2}$ electrons can form interlayer Cooper pairs, leading to an extended $s$-wave pairing SC with high $T_c$. Meanwhile, the strongly localized $3d_{z^2}$ electrons tend to form interlayer rung singlets. Due to a lack of phase coherence, these singlets do not directly participate in the SC condensate, but instead give rise to a pseudogap phase.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了双层镍氧化物La₃Ni₂O₇中高温超导电性的理论机制，重点提出了基于强耦合Hund辅助的配对图像：局域的3d_z²轨道通过层间反铁磁耦合将有效相互作用J⊥传递给巡游的3d_{x²-y²}轨道，形成双层t-J-J⊥模型，从而实现层间s波配对高温超导，同时局域电子形成层间单子导致赝能隙相。
AI.motivation: 实验发现双层镍氧化物La₃Ni₂O₇中存在高温超导电性，但其配对机制尚不明确。本工作旨在从强关联理论出发，解释该材料中由Hund耦合辅助的非常规超导配对机制。
AI.method: 基于强耦合Hund辅助场景，分析两个Eg轨道（局域的3d_z²和巡游的3d_{x²-y²}）在双层NiO₂结构中的电子性质；考虑3d_z²轨道通过内顶角氧的2p_z轨道产生的强层间杂化及反铁磁交换；利用Hund耦合将层间反铁磁交换传递给巡游的3d_{x²-y²}轨道，建立最小强耦合双层t-J-J⊥模型。
AI.result: 巡游的3d_{x²-y²}电子在有效层间耦合J⊥驱动下形成层间Cooper对，实现扩展s波配对高温超导；局域的3d_z²电子形成层间rung单子但不直接参与超导凝聚，而是产生赝能隙相。
AI.conclusion: La₃Ni₂O₇的高温超导源于强耦合Hund辅助机制，局域轨道通过层间反铁磁耦合为巡游轨道提供了有效的配对胶合剂，这一图像为理解镍基超导体的非常规超导机制提供了新的理论框架。

title: Symmetry breaking phases and transitions in an Ising fusion category lattice model
summary: An anyon-chain-like lattice model with symmetry described by the Ising fusion category is studied. Combining numerical and analytical studies, we uncover a rich phase diagram that contains three phases: a symmetric critical phase and two categorical symmetry breaking phases. The symmetric phase lies in the same universality class as the usual critical Ising model. The first symmetry-breaking phase, dubbed the \emph{categorical ferromagnetic} phase, has the Ising fusion category fully broken and exhibits a threefold ground-state degeneracy, as expected from the generalized Landau paradigm. The other symmetry-breaking phase is analogous to a conventional antiferromagnet: it breaks lattice translation and part of the Ising fusion category, and therefore is termed the \emph{categorical antiferromagnetic} phase. Unlike ordinary antiferromagnetic states associated with finite invertible symmetry breaking, this phase itself is critical, being described by a fourfold degenerate Ising conformal field theory. We argue more generally that antiferromagnetic states associated with broken non-invertible symmetries have a large low-energy manifold that grows exponentially in system size, due to the greater-than-one quantum dimension of domain walls. We also numerically study the transitions between the three phases. The transition between the symmetric and categorical ferromagnetic phase is described by the $c=7/10$ tricritical Ising CFT, while the transition between the symmetric and categorical antiferromagnetic phases is less understood. Our numerical data suggest that the latter transition is continuous and described by a conformal field theory with central charge $c=3/2$.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了一种具有Ising融合类别对称性的任意子链状格点模型，通过数值和解析方法揭示了包含三个相的丰富相图：一个对称临界相（与通常的临界Ising模型同普适类）、一个完全破缺Ising融合类别的“范畴铁磁相”（三重简并基态），以及一个既破缺晶格平移又破缺部分Ising融合类别的“范畴反铁磁相”（四重简并Ising CFT描述）。特别指出非可逆对称性破缺的反铁磁态具有随系统尺寸指数增长的低能流形。
AI.motivation: 理解非可逆对称性（范畴对称性）破缺的物理后果，超越传统的Landau范式，探索非可逆对称性破缺所导致的新奇量子相和相变。
AI.method: 结合数值模拟（如DMRG等）和解析分析（共形场论、融合范畴理论），研究具有Ising融合类别对称性的任意子链模型。
AI.result: 发现了三个相：对称临界相（c=1/2 Ising CFT）、范畴铁磁相（完全破缺，三重基态简并）、范畴反铁磁相（部分破缺，四重简并Ising CFT，具临界性）。对称-铁磁相变为c=7/10三重临界Ising CFT；对称-反铁磁相变可能为c=3/2 CFT。反铁磁非可逆对称破缺态的低能流形指数增长。
AI.conclusion: 非可逆对称性的破缺可以产生超越传统Landau范式的新奇相和相变，如反铁磁型破缺导致临界相本身，且低能流形因畴壁的量子维数大于1而指数扩大。

title: Transverse thermophotovoltaics from nonreciprocal plasmon drag in metal
summary: Transverse thermophotovoltaics has been conceptually proposed as a paradigm distinct from conventional junction-based photovoltaics, but has so far lacked a theoretical foundation. In this Letter, we establish a microscopic formalism of this effect in which a transverse electric current emerges in a two-dimensional metal sheet via nonreciprocal surface plasmon polaritons driven by near-field thermal radiation. This theoretical formalism incorporates the electron-photon interaction by integrating electronic transition factor governed by energy-momentum conservation, the photon flux factor encoding the nonreciprocal surface modes, and their directional coupling. Our approach quantitatively confirms the plasmon-drag mechanism and reveals the role of impurity scattering. This work provides a rigorous theoretical foundation for transverse thermophotovoltaic devices and opens avenues for active nanoscale thermal energy conversion.

AI.tldr: 本文建立了横向热光伏效应的微观理论框架，揭示了二维金属片中的非互易表面等离激元在近场热辐射驱动下产生横向电流的机制。
AI.motivation: 横向热光伏效应虽被概念性提出，但一直缺乏理论基础，本文旨在从微观层面建立其理论形式。
AI.method: 通过整合电子跃迁因子（遵循能量-动量守恒）、光子通量因子（编码非互易表面模式）及其定向耦合，构建了电子-光子相互作用的微观形式理论。
AI.result: 定量证实了等离激元拖曳机制，揭示了杂质散射的作用。
AI.conclusion: 为横向热光伏器件提供了严格的理论基础，为主动式纳米尺度热能转换开辟了新的路径。

title: Accelerating the Design of Resorbable Magnesium Alloys: A Machine Learning Approach to Property Prediction
summary: Resorbable magnesium (Mg) alloys are promising candidates for temporary medical devices due to their biodegradability and favorable mechanical properties. To accelerate the design of diluted Mg alloys for implants, we developed a data-driven framework to elucidate the complex relationships between composition, processing, and mechanical properties. The framework screens mechanical properties within biocompatible compositional limits, treating degradation as a design constraint rather than an explicit prediction target. Using a dataset of 410 samples, we trained six different machine learning (ML) models to predict yield strength, ultimate tensile strength, and elongation. Among them, ensemble models, particularly CatBoost, demonstrated high predictive accuracy (R2, YS = 0.950, UTS = 0.916 and El = 0.903). SHapley Additive exPlanation analysis revealed that thermomechanical processing conditions and alloying elements such as Zn, Mn and Gd are the most influential factors governing mechanical behavior in diluted Mg alloys. Validation on the experimental dataset confirmed the models' robustness and generalization capability in capturing process-property relationships. The optimized CatBoost model was further employed to generate predictive property maps visualizing the strength-ductility trade-off as a function of Zn-Mn composition. This work establishes a validated ML framework for rapid in silico screening and targeted design of next-generation resorbable Mg alloys.

AI.tldr: 本文建立了一个数据驱动的机器学习框架，利用410个样本和六种ML模型（CatBoost表现最佳）预测可吸收镁合金的屈服强度、抗拉强度和延伸率，并通过SHAP分析识别关键影响因素（热机械加工条件、Zn/Mn/Gd元素），最终生成成分-性能预测图谱，用于快速筛选和设计下一代可吸收镁合金植入材料。
AI.motivation: 加速可吸收镁合金植入材料的设计，解决成分、加工工艺与力学性能之间复杂关系的难题，避免传统试错法的高成本与低效率。
AI.method: 基于410个样本数据集，训练六种机器学习模型（以CatBoost集成模型最优），采用SHAP可解释性分析识别关键影响因素，并在实验数据集上验证模型鲁棒性，最后生成Zn-Mn成分与强度-延展性权衡的预测性能图谱。
AI.result: CatBoost模型预测精度高（屈服强度R²=0.950，抗拉强度R²=0.916，延伸率R²=0.903）；热机械加工条件及Zn、Mn、Gd合金元素是影响力学性能的最关键因素；模型成功捕捉了工艺-性能关系并具有良好的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 本研究建立了一个经过验证的机器学习框架，能够实现可吸收镁合金的快速计算机筛选和靶向设计，为下一代可吸收镁合金植入材料的开发提供了高效的计算工具。

title: Mesoscopic theory of flocking with alignment and anti-alignment copying
summary: We study a stochastic model of collective motion in which individuals update their orientation through pairwise aligning or anti-aligning copying interactions. We analyze both annealed dynamics, where interaction types are chosen probabilistically at each update, and quenched dynamics, where individuals are permanently assigned to aligning or anti-aligning subpopulations. Starting from the microscopic master equation on the circle, we derive an exact mesoscopic description via a Fourier-mode expansion and a systematic large $N$ expansion, obtaining closed Fokker-Planck equations and effective stochastic differential equations for the polarization. We show that competing alignment and anti-alignment suppress long-range polar order in the thermodynamic limit in both cases, while finite systems display nontrivial fluctuation-induced structure controlled by the interaction composition. Our results, validated by Gillespie simulations, establish an analytically tractable framework for collective dynamics characterized by competing copying rules and intrinsic noise.

AI.tldr: 本文建立了一个包含对齐和反对齐复制相互作用的集体运动随机模型，通过傅里叶模式展开和大N展开推导出精确的介观描述，证明在热力学极限下竞争作用会抑制长程极有序，而有限系统则表现出由相互作用组成控制的涨落诱导结构。
AI.motivation: 现有集体运动模型多关注单一类型的对齐相互作用（如Vicsek模型），对混合了对齐与反对齐复制规则的集体动力学缺乏系统的理论分析框架。
AI.method: 从微观主方程出发，利用傅里叶模式展开和大N展开，推导出封闭的Fokker-Planck方程和极化的有效随机微分方程；分别分析退火动力学（交互类型概率性选择）和淬火动力学（个体永久分配为对齐或反对齐子群体）。
AI.result: 竞争的对齐和反对齐相互作用在热力学极限下抑制长程极有序；有限系统中存在由交互组成控制的涨落诱导结构；Gillespie模拟验证了理论结果。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为具有竞争复制规则和内在噪声的集体动力学建立了一个可解析处理的框架，为理解自然界中混合交互类型的集体行为提供了理论基础。

title: Domain-Wall-Mediated Ultralow-Barrier Sliding and Pinning in Ferroelectric Moiré Superlattices Revealed by Machine Learning
summary: Sliding ferroelectrics built from stacked nonpolar monolayers enable out-of-plane polarization and unconventional switching via interlayer sliding, yet the microscopic sliding dynamics remain unclear. Using machine-learning molecular dynamics, we reveal spontaneous thermally driven interlayer sliding in ferroelectric MoS2 moiré superlattices, with relative velocities on the order of 1 m/s at 300 K. Instead of rigid translation of the entire bilayer, the motion appears as a global drift of the moiré pattern. Such thermally driven sliding is inconsistent with the meV/atom-scale rigid-sliding barrier. In contrast, when constrained relaxation is allowed, the sliding proceeds along an almost barrierless pathway that directly reproduces the global drift of the moiré pattern. Furthermore, sulfur vacancies trigger a sliding-to-pinning transition, with about 0.1% S vacancies already sufficient to convert the long-range sliding into localized oscillations. Notably, these phenomena are not restricted to small twist angles, but arise generically in twisting-induced multidomain structures. These results reveal that the sliding process is governed by a domain-wall-mediated collective reconstruction pathway with an ultralow barrier, rather than rigid layer translation, deepening the understanding of microscopic dynamics in moiré superlattices and sliding ferroelectrics.

AI.tldr: 本文通过机器学习分子动力学模拟，揭示了MoS₂莫尔超晶格中由热驱动自发产生的层间滑动现象，发现滑动速度可达~1 m/s。滑动并非刚性的整体层平移，而是莫尔图案的整体漂移，且路径几乎无势垒。硫空位缺陷（~0.1%）即可将长程滑动转为局域振荡。研究表明滑动由畴壁介导的集体重构路径主导，而非刚性层间平移。
AI.motivation: 尽管滑动铁电体已展现出非常规极化翻转特性，但其微观滑动动力学机制尚不清楚，特别是层间滑动的具体路径和势垒特性。
AI.method: 采用机器学习分子动力学模拟，结合约束与非约束弛豫方法，研究MoS₂莫尔超晶格在有限温度下的层间滑动行为，并引入硫空位缺陷分析其对滑动的影响。
AI.result: 300 K下观察到~1 m/s自发热驱动滑动；滑动表现为莫尔图案整体漂移，而非刚体平移；弛豫约束下滑动沿几乎无势垒路径进行；~0.1%硫空位即可抑制长程滑动；这些现象在小扭转角下普遍存在。
AI.conclusion: 滑动铁电体的微观滑动由畴壁介导的集体重构路径主导，势垒极低，不同于传统刚性层平移模型；缺陷可有效调控滑动行为。

title: How is a gas sensor poisoned by volatile methylsiloxanes?
summary: Volatile methyl siloxanes (VMSs), widely present in consumer and industrial products, have attracted increasing concerns due to their persistence, bioaccumulation behavior, and adverse health effects. Beyond their environmental implications, VMSs also pose operational challenges for sensing technologies because they readily decompose on sensing materials to form silicon-based compounds (e.g., silica and silane) that irreversibly impair sensing performance, a phenomenon commonly known as siloxane poisoning. Despite its prevalence, the mechanistic basis of this deactivation remains poorly understood. Herein, we present the first comprehensive theoretical study of siloxane-induced poisoning in catalytic gas sensors. Guided by our self-developed AI Agent, Digital Sensor Platform (DigSen), we first identify siloxane poisoning as a previously overlooked yet high-impact research direction. Using hexamethyldisiloxane (HMDS) as a model compound, we then conducted first-principles calculations to uncover decomposition pathways across noble metal surfaces. Strikingly, a descriptor-based microkinetic volcano model is developed to capture the trade-off between sensing activity and resistance to poisoning, enabling predictive identification of anti-poisoning candidates. These insights not only elucidate the origin of siloxane poisoning but also demonstrate how AI-driven discovery, mechanistic theory, and experiments can be integrated into a closed-loop framework for catalytic sensor design. More broadly, this AI-guided paradigm represents a generalizable strategy for materials digital discovery, offering a transferable methodology that extends well beyond siloxane systems to diverse classes of materials challenges.

AI.tldr: 本文首次通过理论计算揭示了挥发性甲基硅氧烷（VMSs）在催化气体传感器中引发硅氧烷中毒的机制。研究团队基于自主开发的AI智能体（DigSen），结合第一性原理计算和微动力学火山模型，解析了HMDS在贵金属表面的分解路径，并建立了传感活性与抗中毒性能之间的权衡关系，最终提出了一种AI驱动的闭环催化传感器设计范式。
AI.motivation: 硅氧烷广泛存在于日用品和工业产品中，其持久性、生物累积性和健康风险日益受到关注。此外，硅氧烷会在传感材料表面分解生成硅基化合物，导致传感器性能不可逆退化（即硅氧烷中毒），但这一失活现象的机制尚不明确，亟需系统的理论研究。
AI.method: 1) 利用自研AI智能体DigSen识别出硅氧烷中毒这一被忽视的高影响研究方向；2) 以六甲基二硅氧烷（HMDS）为模型化合物，采用第一性原理计算揭示其在贵金属表面的分解路径；3) 构建基于描述符的微动力学火山模型，捕捉传感活性与抗中毒能力之间的权衡关系。
AI.result: 成功建立了描述符驱动的微动力学火山模型，能够预测识别具有抗中毒能力的候选材料，阐明了硅氧烷中毒的起源机制，并实现了AI发现、机理理论与实验验证的闭环整合。
AI.conclusion: 本研究不仅揭示了硅氧烷中毒的机理基础，还展示了AI驱动的发现、机理理论和实验相结合的材料数字化发现闭环框架。该AI引导范式可推广至硅氧烷体系之外，为多种材料挑战提供可迁移的方法论。

title: Stabilization of a non-superconducting, orthorhombic phase by over-hydrogenating LaFeSiH
summary: Chemical composition provides a powerful route to tune the electronic ground state of iron-based superconductors and other quantum materials, yet access to highly doped phases remains limited. Here we demonstrate that high-pressure thermal decomposition of hydrogen-rich precursors enables over-hydrogenation of LaFeSi. Using anthracene, we synthesize tetragonal superconducting LaFeSiH, including a single hydrogen site, while ammonia borane yields a structurally distorted over-hydrogenated phase, LaFeSiH1+x, with an orthorhombic structure. Chemical analysis reveal excess hydrogen (x ~ 0.6), implying a second H site in LaFeSiH1.6 whose localization and occupancy are determined by neutron diffraction. In contrast to metallic LaFeSi and superconducting LaFeSiH, orthorhombic LaFeSiH1.6 exhibits semiconductor-like behavior. Upon hydrogen release near 100 °C, it transforms into tetragonal superconducting LaFeSiH1+δ (δ << 0.6). These results establish the chemical flexibility of the layered LaFeSiX (X = H, O, F) family and provide access to a high hydrogen-doping regime, creating new opportunities to investigate superconductivity in Fe-based silicides.

AI.tldr: 通过高压热分解含氢前驱体（蒽和氨硼烷），实现了对LaFeSi的过度氢化，合成了四方相超导LaFeSiH和正交相过氢化LaFeSiH1.6半导体相，后者在加热释放部分氢后可转变为四方超导相。
AI.motivation: 化学组成为调控铁基超导体等量子材料的电子基态提供了有效途径，但高掺杂相的可及性有限，亟需发展新方法以获得更高氢掺杂的物相。
AI.method: 利用高压热分解技术，分别以蒽和氨硼烷为氢源前驱体，处理LaFeSi母体化合物，合成不同氢含量的LaFeSiH和LaFeSiH1+x相；结合中子衍射确定氢原子的占位和局域化信息。
AI.result: 成功合成了具有单一氢位点的四方超导LaFeSiH和过氢化正交相LaFeSiH1.6（x~0.6），后者存在第二个氢位点，表现为类半导体行为；加热至100°C释放部分氢后，正交相可转变为四方超导相LaFeSiH1+δ。
AI.conclusion: 该工作揭示了层状LaFeSiX（X=H, O, F）家族的化学灵活性，开辟了高氢掺杂区间，为铁基硅化物中超导电性的研究提供了新机遇。

title: Disorder-driven coexistence of distinct dynamical states in frustrated Sr$_3$CuNb$_2$O$_9$: a microscopic $μ$SR and $^{93}$Nb NMR study
summary: Despite recent progress in identifying the exotic random singlet (RS) state in disordered frustrated magnets as a distinct correlated phase, three-dimensional (3D) realizations remain scarce. Sr$_3$CuNb$_2$O$_9$ was proposed to be one of such 3D frustrated systems with magnetic site disorder hosting an RS ground state. Here, we report a detailed microscopic investigation of Sr$_3$CuNb$_2$O$_9$ employing muon spin relaxation ($μ$SR) and $^{93}$Nb nuclear magnetic resonance (NMR) techniques. The $μ$SR zero-field relaxation rate reveals a power-law divergence of the relaxation rate as a function of temperature. Also, a power-law divergence is present in the relaxation rate as a function of applied longitudinal field, consistent with the formation of an RS phase. The $^{93}$Nb NMR spectra unambiguously resolve two components with distinct local magnetic environments, whose nature is further elucidated through spin-lattice relaxation measurements analyzed via an inverse Laplace transform (ILT) of the nuclear magnetization recovery. The relaxation-rate distribution obtained from ILT reveals two well-separated channels: a fast component, $(1/T_1)_{\mathrm{fast}}$, and a slow component, $(1/T_1)_{\mathrm{slow}}$. Both components follow distinct power-law temperature dependences ($T^α$), with $α= 0.6$ and $1.1$ for the fast and slow channels, respectively. The combined spectral and relaxation data demonstrate that the fast channel qualitatively represents an RS-like state, whereas the slow channel exhibits quantum spin liquid (QSL) like behavior, thereby establishing the microscopic coexistence of RS and QSL-like phases in Sr$_3$CuNb$_2$O$_9$.

AI.tldr: 本文通过μSR和NMR技术对Sr₃CuNb₂O₉进行微观研究，发现该材料中同时存在随机单态（RS）和量子自旋液体（QSL）两种相，它们具有不同的幂律温度依赖关系，首次在3D受阻磁体中建立了RS与QSL相的微观共存。
AI.motivation: 三维随机单态（RS）相的实验实现仍然非常稀少，尽管在受挫无序磁体中识别RS态已取得进展。Sr₃CuNb₂O₉被提出是可能具有RS基态的3D受阻系统，但需要微观层面的详细验证。
AI.method: 采用μSR零场和纵场弛豫率测量，以及⁹³Nb NMR谱和自旋-晶格弛豫测量，结合逆拉普拉斯变换（ILT）分析核磁化恢复曲线，提取弛豫率分布。
AI.result: μSR弛豫率在温度和纵场上均呈现幂律发散行为。NMR谱明确分辨出两个具有不同局域磁环境的组分。ILT分析揭示了两条分离的弛豫通道：快通道(1/T₁)fast和慢通道(1/T₁)slow，分别遵循T^0.6和T^1.1的幂律温度依赖。
AI.conclusion: 快通道定性代表RS态，慢通道表现出QSL行为，从而确立了Sr₃CuNb₂O₉中RS相与QSL-like相的微观共存。

title: Light-Induced Topological Phase Transitions and Anomalous Thermal Transport in d-Wave Altermagnets
summary: We study intrinsic thermal transport and Floquet-engineered topology in a two-dimensional d wave altermagnetic topological insulator powered by linearly polarized light. We analyze the anomalous Hall, Nernst, and thermal Hall conductivities, as well as their spin-resolved equivalents, and develop closed-form formulas for the Berry curvature using an analytically calculated high-frequency effective Hamiltonian. We demonstrate that linearly polarized light, in contrast to conventional antiferromagnets, breaks the symmetry connecting spin sectors in altermagnets, allowing a series of spin-selective topological phase transitions from a quantum spin Hall state to a spin-polarized Chern insulator and finally to a trivial phase. The Nernst response shows substantial thermal activation and significant sensitivity to the gap size in the Chern domain, but both the electrical and thermal Hall responses become quantized and meet the anomalous Wiedemann Franz law. Every anomalous transport coefficient exhibits a distinctive d wave dependence on the polarization angle, reversing sign under orthogonal rotation and vanishing at symmetry-restoring directions. Our findings show a path to all-optical regulation of topological and caloritronic responses beyond traditional magnetic systems and establish thermal transport as a sensitive probe of altermagnetic order.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了线性偏振光驱动的二维d波交变磁拓扑绝缘体中的本征热输运和Floquet工程拓扑，发现光场可以诱导自旋选择性的拓扑相变，并展示了交变磁体中独特的热电输运特性，包括d波角度依赖性和反常Wiedemann-Franz定律的满足。
AI.motivation: 探索交变磁体（altermagnet）这一新兴磁性材料中，光场调控下的拓扑与热输运性质，特别是相比传统反铁磁体，交变磁体在线性偏振光下能打破自旋扇区之间的对称性，从而实现全光调控拓扑相变和热电子响应。
AI.method: 通过解析计算高频有效哈密顿量，推导贝里曲率的闭式公式；系统分析了反常霍尔、能斯特和热霍尔电导率及其自旋分辨对应量，并研究了偏振角对输运系数的影响。
AI.result: 发现了从量子自旋霍尔态到自旋极化Chern绝缘体再到平庸相的自旋选择性拓扑相变序列；能斯特响应表现出显著的热激活行为和对能隙大小的高敏感性；电学和热学霍尔响应均满足反常Wiedemann-Franz定律；所有反常输运系数均呈现d波依赖的偏振角依赖性。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了超越传统磁系统的全光调控拓扑和热电子响应路径，并建立了热输运作为探测交变磁序的灵敏探针。

title: Inhibitory neuristor based on metal-to-insulator transition
summary: Mimicking the collective excitatory and inhibitory behaviors of biological neurons remains a critical challenge in the development of neuromorphic computing systems that rival the complexity and performance of the human brain. Volatile high-to-low resistance switching in insulator-to-metal transition (IMT) materials produces an abrupt increase in current flow, resembling neuronal excitation. This electrical excitation enables IMT materials to be driven into a neuron-like spiking self-oscillation regime using simple RC circuits. Here, we report a new type of self-oscillation dynamics that occurs in the opposite class of metal-to-insulator transition (MIT) materials. Electrical triggering of the MIT suppresses current flow, resembling neuronal inhibition. Using a prototypical MIT material, we experimentally demonstrate inhibitory-like self-oscillations in two-terminal switching devices incorporated into a simple RL circuit. Our results show robust ~0.1 - 1 MHz electric current oscillations with minimal cycle-to-cycle variation, which can be controlled by varying the applied DC voltage, temperature, and inductance. This work demonstrates a new type of inhibitory MIT-based artificial neuron that can complement the excitatory functionalities of IMT-based neuristors in biologically plausible neuromorphic systems.

AI.tldr: 本文报道了一种基于金属-绝缘体相变（MIT）材料的新型抑制性自振荡动力学，通过在RL电路中实现类似神经元抑制行为的电流振荡（~0.1-1 MHz），与传统的绝缘体-金属相变（IMT）材料实现的兴奋性神经元互补，为构建生物合理的神经形态计算系统提供了新途径。
AI.motivation: 生物神经元的兴奋与抑制行为协同工作，而现有神经形态器件主要聚焦于模仿兴奋性行为（基于IMT材料），缺乏对抑制性行为的有效模拟。本文旨在开发一种能模仿神经元抑制行为的MIT基人工神经元。
AI.method: 使用原型MIT材料制备两端开关器件，将其集成到简单RL电路中，通过电触发MIT抑制电流流动，实现抑制性自振荡。通过调节直流电压、温度和电感控制振荡特性。
AI.result: 在RL电路中实验实现了~0.1-1 MHz的稳定电流振荡，周期间变化极小，振荡频率可通过直流电压、温度和电感进行调控。
AI.conclusion: 该工作证明了基于MIT的抑制性人工神经元的存在，能够与IMT基兴奋性神经元互补，为构建更生物合理的神经形态系统提供了关键抑制性组件。

title: Spectral Fluctuation-Dissipation-Response Inequalities
summary: We derive spectral fluctuation--dissipation--response inequalities for finite-state Markov jump processes. By comparing the causal susceptibility to its passive equilibrium reference, we establish frequency-resolved and frequency-integrated inequalities that bound their mismatch in terms of the steady-state entropy production rate, probe variance, short-time perturbation diffusion, and reversible relaxation timescales. Our bounds exactly recover the standard fluctuation--dissipation theorem at equilibrium and apply directly to measurable causal susceptibilities, providing experimentally testable thermodynamic limits on FDT breakdown in driven steady states.

AI.tldr: 本文推导了有限状态马尔可夫跳跃过程的谱涨落-耗散-响应不等式，通过比较因果磁化率与被动平衡参考，建立了频率分辨和频率积分的不等式，将它们的失配与稳态熵产生率、探针方差、短时扰动扩散和可逆弛豫时间尺度联系起来。
AI.motivation: 研究旨在建立非平衡稳态中涨落-耗散定理（FDT）失效的热力学极限，提供可实验检验的界限来量化驱动系统中因果磁化率与平衡参考之间的失配程度。
AI.method: 采用有限状态马尔可夫跳跃过程模型，通过比较因果磁化率与被动平衡参考，推导频率分辨和频率积分的不等式，并引入稳态熵产生率、探针方差、短时扰动扩散和可逆弛豫时间尺度等关键物理量来约束失配程度。
AI.result: 建立了谱涨落-耗散-响应不等式，在平衡态下精确恢复标准FDT，为非平衡稳态中FDT的失效提供了可实验检验的热力学极限。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为驱动稳态中因果磁化率偏离FDT的程度提供了严格的热力学界限，具有直接的可实验检验性。

title: Second-order topology in two-dimensional azulenoid kekulene carbon lattices
summary: The discovery of higher-order topological insulator (HOTI) has established a new paradigm for understanding symmetry-constrained boundary electronic states. Here, based on first-principles calculations, we demonstrate the emergence of HOTI phase in organic lattices of two-dimensional azulenoid-kekulene-type carbon allotropes, namely AKC-[3,3] and AKC-[6,0]. Enabled by the $C_6$ rotational symmetry, the nontrivial bulk topology is confirmed through the topological invariant and fractionally quantized corner charge, giving $\{[M^{(I)}_{2}],[K^{(3)}_{2}]\}$ = $\{0,2\}$ and $Q_{\mathrm{corner}} = e/3$, respectively, accompanied by the emergence of exotic corner states in nanoflakes. Notably, the structural modifications are explored, revealing that in the derived structure PAK-[6,0], whose corner-localized states are preserved, highlighting the robustness of the higher-order topological phase. These findings highlight azulenoid-kekulene-based carbon allotropes as a promising platform to explore the interplay between structural design, crystalline symmetry, and higher-order topological boundary responses in two dimensional carbon systems.

AI.tldr: 本文通过第一性原理计算，在二维azulenoid-kekulene型碳同素异形体（AKC-[3,3]和AKC-[6,0]）中发现了高阶拓扑绝缘体（HOTI）相，并通过拓扑不变量和分数角电荷（Q_corner = e/3）证实了其非平庸拓扑性质，在纳米片中观察到奇异的角态。对衍生结构PAK-[6,0]的研究表明角态得到保留，体现了高阶拓扑相的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 高阶拓扑绝缘体（HOTI）是拓扑物理的新范式，但二维有机晶格中的HOTI相尚未被充分探索，需要寻找新的材料平台来研究对称性约束的边界电子态。
AI.method: 采用第一性原理计算，通过拓扑不变量[M^{(I)}_{2}, K^{(3)}_{2}] = {0,2}和分数化角电荷Q_corner = e/3来表征非平庸体拓扑性质，并研究结构修饰对拓扑相的影响。
AI.result: 在AKC-[3,3]和AKC-[6,0]中确认了由C6旋转对称性支持的非平庸体拓扑，观察到纳米片中的奇异角态；衍生结构PAK-[6,0]保留了角态，证实了高阶拓扑相的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: Azulenoid-kekulene基碳同素异形体为探索二维碳体系中结构设计、晶体对称性与高阶拓扑边界响应之间的相互作用提供了有前景的平台。

title: Restoring the Conical Intersection Topology using Convex Density Functional Theory
summary: Conical intersections are central to the description of photophysics and photochemistry. Nevertheless, in non-adiabatic molecular dynamics simulations, they are fundamentally challenging for single-reference electronic structure methods. Density functional theory (DFT) and its time-dependent extension (TDDFT) represent the most widely used theoretical approaches in physics, chemistry, and biology. However, the treatment of ground and excited states as separate problems leads to breakdowns in the topological structure of potential energy surfaces near conical intersections. In this work, we solve this long-standing issue by presenting Convex DFT (CVX-DFT), a framework that, by explicitly enforcing convexity of the variational problem within an appropriately defined subspace, guarantees a unique and continuous electronic solution across regions of degeneracies. We demonstrate that CVX-DFT yields smooth and physically meaningful intersection seams by comparison with reference methods, such as multireference wave function methods. In this way, we establish the method as a robust and computationally efficient DFT approach for treating electronically degenerate regions. These developments represent a critical step toward reliable non-adiabatic simulations beyond the limitations of conventional TDDFT.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Convex DFT (CVX-DFT)框架，通过强制变分问题的凸性，保证了电子结构在圆锥交叉点附近解的唯一性和连续性，从而解决了传统DFT/TDDFT在非绝热动力学模拟中拓扑结构失效的长期问题。
AI.motivation: 圆锥交叉点对光物理和光化学描述至关重要，但传统单参考电子结构方法（如DFT/TDDFT）在处理基态和激发态时将其作为独立问题处理，导致在圆锥交叉点附近势能面的拓扑结构崩溃，无法准确描述非绝热动力学。
AI.method: 提出CVX-DFT框架，在适当定义的子空间内显式强制变分问题的凸性，从而保证在简并区域电子解的唯—性和连续性。
AI.result: 与多参考波函数方法等参考方法相比，CVX-DFT能够产生平滑且物理意义明确的交叉点缝合线（seams），证明了该方法在处理电子简并区域时的鲁棒性和计算效率。
AI.conclusion: CVX-DFT作为一种稳健且计算高效的DFT方法，为超越传统TDDFT局限性的可靠非绝热模拟迈出了关键一步。

title: Interaction-induced asymmetry in infinite-temperature dynamical correlations of hard-core anyons
summary: We study dynamical correlations of interacting hard-core anyons on a one-dimensional lattice at infinite temperature. This is a setting in which the many-body spectrum is independent of the statistical phase $θ$, while dynamical correlators remain sensitive to $θ$ through nonlocal Jordan-Wigner strings. We compute single-particle Green's functions, spectral functions, and density-density correlators, thereby separating the effects of fractional statistics on one-body coherence from those on density transport in a maximally mixed ensemble. In the noninteracting case $V=0$, high-temperature averaging leads to inversion-symmetric Green's functions for all $θ$ despite the presence of anyonic strings. Finite nearest-neighbor interactions $V$ generate, however, a pronounced left-right asymmetry in the Green's functions for $0<θ<π$, with the strongest chirality appearing at intermediate couplings $V\sim J$ where interactions and hopping compete most effectively. In this regime, the Green's function decays exponentially in time with a statistical-angle-dependent decay rate. At strong coupling, the dynamics crosses over to an atomic-limit regime in which the dependence on $θ$ is reduced. Here the Green's function decays universally as $t^{-1}$ and the corresponding spectral function displays a three-band structure. In contrast, density-density correlations are insensitive to statistics and recover the known infinite-temperature transport regimes of the XXZ chain, including ballistic, superdiffusive and diffusive behaviours. These results identify dynamical correlation functions as direct probes of fractional statistics in high-entropy quantum systems.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了无限温度下一维晶格中相互作用的硬核任意子（anyons）的动力学关联函数，发现单粒子格林函数对统计相位θ敏感并呈现左右不对称性，而密度-密度关联对统计不敏感。中间耦合V~J时出现最强手性，强耦合时动力学进入原子极限区域并呈现普适的t^{-1}衰减。
AI.motivation: 探究高熵（无限温度）量子系统中分数统计（任意子）对动力学关联函数的影响，区分统计相位对单粒子相干性与密度输运的不同作用，寻找直接探测分数统计的实验可观测信号。
AI.method: 研究一维晶格中相互作用的硬核任意子，利用多体谱与统计相位θ无关但动力学关联函数通过非局域Jordan-Wigner弦对θ敏感的特性。分别计算单粒子格林函数、谱函数和密度-密度关联函数，分析不同相互作用强度V下的行为。
AI.result: (1) 非相互作用V=0时格林函数处处反演对称；(2) 有限最近邻相互作用V在0<θ<π时产生显著的左右不对称性，中间耦合V~J时手性最强，格林函数指数衰减，衰减率依赖θ；(3) 强耦合时进入原子极限，θ依赖性减弱，格林函数普适衰减为t^{-1}，谱函数呈现三带结构；(4) 密度-密度关联对统计不敏感，与XXZ链无限温度输运行为一致（弹道、超扩散、扩散）。
AI.conclusion: 动力学关联函数（尤其是单粒子格林函数）是直接探测高熵量子系统中分数统计的有效工具，统计相位的影响主要体现在单粒子相干性而非密度输运上。

title: N-fold topological mode replication in hierarchical honeycomb lattices
summary: Multi-band topological states enable robust and versatile wave manipulation across a variety of physical platforms. However, the emergence of multi-band topological states has relied on higher-frequency modes with complex spatial profiles, which constrains the realization of robust topological states due to fragile symmetry and pseudospin hybridization in these modes. Here, we show a general design principle for scalable multi-band topological states by replicating a robust fundamental topological mode in the frequency domain. By introducing hierarchical resonators as an internal degree of freedom into a quantum spin Hall-based lattice, multiple topological states emerge discretely in correspondence with the hierarchical levels while preserving the spatial profile of the fundamental mode at the host lattice. Implementing this design principle in a versatile microelectromechanical platform, we experimentally demonstrate that the fundamental and replicated topological modes propagate simultaneously in a single waveguide while suppressing mutual cross-talk. Our results establish topology replication as a universal strategy for designing multi-band topological systems and open routes toward multi-channel topological wave devices.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过复制基础拓扑模式到频域来实现可扩展多带拓扑态的设计原理，并在微机电平台上实验验证了多通道同时传播且互不干扰的拓扑波导。
AI.motivation: 现有多带拓扑态依赖具有复杂空间分布的高频模式，这些模式存在对称性脆弱和赝自旋杂化问题，限制了鲁棒拓扑态的实现。
AI.method: 在量子自旋霍尔晶格中引入分层谐振器作为内禀自由度，通过复制基础拓扑模式到不同频率层级，实现多带拓扑态。
AI.result: 在微机电平台上实验证明了基础拓扑模式与复制拓扑模式可在单波导中同时传播，并有效抑制相互串扰。
AI.conclusion: 拓扑复制可作为设计多带拓扑系统的通用策略，为多通道拓扑波导器件开辟新路径。

title: Symmetry-dictated switching of antiferromagnetic magnon transport in 2D multiferroics
summary: While antiferromagnetic magnons in two-dimensional (2D) materials hold immense promise for high-frequency spintronics, achieving their efficient active control remains a critical challenge. Here, we propose a universal mechanism for the nonvolatile ferroelectric (FE) switching of antiferromagnetic magnon transport in 2D multiferroic lattices. Our mechanism relies on coupling the magnon geometric phase to the FE-induced sublattice asymmetry in exchange and Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya interactions. This explicitly breaks the exact compensation of opposite-chirality magnons inherent to collinear antiferromagnets, lifting their spin degeneracy and inducing a highly tunable net Berry curvature. Crucially, reversing the FE polarization deterministically swaps these magnetic asymmetries, which completely inverts the net magnon Berry curvature and the resulting anomalous thermal Hall conductivity. Using first-principles and linear spin-wave theory, we rigorously validate this geometric-phase-driven mechanism in single-layer CuCr2Se4. Our findings establish a robust paradigm for coupling multiferroicity with the magnon geometric phase, paving the way for nonvolatile and electrically switchable antiferromagnetic magnonics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在二维多铁材料中通过铁电极化非易失地切换反铁磁子输运的通用机制，该机制基于磁子几何相位与铁电诱导的亚晶格不对称性耦合，并在单层CuCr2Se4中通过第一性原理和线性自旋波理论验证。
AI.motivation: 二维反铁磁材料中的磁子在高频自旋电子学中潜力巨大，但实现其高效主动调控仍是一大关键挑战。
AI.method: 提出一种通用机制，利用磁子几何相位与铁电诱导的交换作用和Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya相互作用中的亚晶格不对称性耦合，通过反转铁电极化来交换磁不对称性，从而反转净磁子贝里曲率和异常热霍尔电导率。采用第一性原理和线性自旋波理论在单层CuCr2Se4中验证。
AI.result: 铁电反转可确定性交换磁不对称性，完全反转净磁子贝里曲率及异常热霍尔电导率，实现了对反铁磁子输运的非易失电切换。
AI.conclusion: 建立了多铁性与磁子几何相位耦合的鲁棒范式，为非易失、电可切换的反铁磁磁子学铺平了道路。

title: Quantum many-body scars leading to time-translation symmetry breaking in kicked interacting spin models
summary: We study an Ising model with long-range interactions undergoing a time-periodic kicking. For different initial states we observe persistent period doubling. When there is period doubling we find that the initial state has relevant overlap with Floquet states showing time-translation symmetry breaking, organized in doublets displaying $π$-spectral pairing (as highlighted by the $π$-spectral gap) and long-range order (as shown by the eigenvalues of the magnetization in the doublet). We observe period doubling for initial states with domain walls and tilted spins, and for the latter ones a finite-size scaling of the relevant $π$-shifted gap and magnetization eigenvalues suggests period-doubling oscillations persisting for larger system sizes and lasting a time exponential in the system size. We find that just a minority of Floquet states displays time-translation symmetry breaking while the rest is thermal, a weak-ergodicity breaking situation typical of systems with quantum scars. Although the time-translation symmetry breaking eigenstates are the minority, their number is exponential in the system size and this motivates the period doubling observed for many different initial states.

AI.tldr: 本文研究具有长程相互作用的Ising模型在时间周期驱动下的双周期行为，发现少数Floquet本征态表现出时间平移对称性破缺（π-光谱配对）并引发持续周期倍增，这些态数量虽少但随系统大小指数增长，属于弱遍历性破缺的量子疤痕现象。
AI.motivation: 探究时间周期驱动下具有长程相互作用的Ising模型是否会出现持续的时间平移对称性破缺（周期倍增），以及这种非平衡量子多体现象的物理机制和普适性。
AI.method: 对长程相互作用Ising模型施加时间周期脉冲（kicking），通过Floquet理论分析本征态结构，计算π-光谱间隙、磁化本征值等序参量，并结合有限尺寸标度分析不同初始态（畴壁态、倾斜自旋态）的动力学演化。
AI.result: 1）少数Floquet态形成双倍结构并展现π-光谱配对和长程有序，实现时间平移对称性破缺；2）倾斜自旋初始态的有限尺寸标度表明周期倍增振荡持续时间随系统指数增长；3）时间平移对称性破缺态数量虽少但随系统大小指数增长，解释了多种初始态均能观察到周期倍增的现象。
AI.conclusion: 周期驱动长程Ising模型中的周期倍增现象源于少数但指数多的Floquet量子疤痕态，这属于弱遍历性破缺机制，为时间晶体在量子多体系统中的实现提供了新的理论视角。

title: Different perspectives on the exact factorization for photon-electron-nuclear systems
summary: We employ the exact factorization of a multi-component wavefunction to analyze the dynamics of interacting photons, electrons and nuclei. We consider physical situations emerging in the regime of strong coupling between light excitations and molecular - electronic excitations, giving rise to the so-called molecular polaritons. Nonadiabatic molecular dynamics techniques, routinely used in the field of chemical physics, have been often employed to simulate photophysical and photochemical phenomena in the presence of molecular polaritons. In this work, we analyze the foundations of these techniques in the eye of the exact factorization and we assess their performance on illustrative model studies.

AI.tldr: 本文利用多组分波函数的精确分解方法，分析了光子、电子和原子核在强耦合（分子极化子）条件下的动力学行为，并从精确分解视角评估了非绝热分子动力学技术在分子极化子模拟中的理论基础和表现。
AI.motivation: 现有非绝热分子动力学技术被广泛用于模拟分子极化子（光-物质强耦合）的光物理和光化学现象，但其理论基础尚未从精确分解的角度得到严格检验。本文旨在通过精确分解方法评估这些技术的有效性。
AI.method: 采用多组分波函数的精确分解方法，从理论角度分析非绝热分子动力学技术在分子极化子模拟中的适用性，并辅以模型算例进行验证。
AI.result: 通过精确分解的视角，揭示了非绝热分子动力学技术在分子极化子动力学模拟中的理论基础和局限性，并在模型研究中评估了其性能表现。
AI.conclusion: 精确分解为理解和评估现有非绝热分子动力学方法在光-物质强耦合体系中的适用性提供了新的理论视角。

title: Gauge-Equivariant Graph Neural Networks for Lattice Gauge Theories
summary: Local gauge symmetry underlies fundamental interactions and strongly correlated quantum matter, yet existing machine-learning approaches lack a general, principled framework for learning under site-dependent symmetries, particularly for intrinsically nonlocal observables. Here we introduce a gauge-equivariant graph neural network that embeds non-Abelian symmetry directly into message passing via matrix-valued, gauge-covariant features and symmetry-compatible updates, extending equivariant learning from global to fully local symmetries. In this formulation, message passing implements gauge-covariant transport across the lattice, allowing nonlocal correlations and loop-like structures to emerge naturally from local operations. We validate the approach across pure gauge, gauge-matter, and dynamical regimes, establishing gauge-equivariant message passing as a general paradigm for learning in systems governed by local symmetry.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种规范等变图神经网络，通过矩阵值、规范协变特征和对称性兼容的消息传递，将非阿贝尔局部规范对称性直接嵌入网络，使非局域关联和环状结构自然涌现，在纯规范、规范-物质和动力学体系中均得到验证。
AI.motivation: 现有机器学习方法缺乏处理局域规范对称性（尤其是非阿贝尔对称性）的通用框架，无法有效学习具有位置相关对称性的系统和本质上非局域的观测量。
AI.method: 提出规范等变图神经网络，将非阿贝尔对称性直接嵌入消息传递机制：使用矩阵值、规范协变的特征表示，并设计对称性兼容的更新规则，使消息传递实现规范协变的格点输运，非局域关联和环状结构由局部操作自然涌现。
AI.result: 在纯规范、规范-物质和动力学三个不同体系中验证了方法的有效性，证明规范等变消息传递作为处理局域对称性系统的通用学习范式。
AI.conclusion: 该工作将等变学习从全局对称性扩展到完全局域对称性，为学习具有局域规范对称性的物理系统提供了一种通用、有原则的框架。

title: Distinguishing and Separating In-Plane Hall Responses
summary: Electric Hall effects generated by an in-plane magnetic field have recently gained attention owing to their intrinsic origin in topological electronic states and potential application in magnetic field sensing. In pratice, the measured transverse electric voltage typically combines contributions from multiple phenomena, such as anisotropy and Berry curvature effects, leading to interpretative ambiguities of the measurement signal. Here, we introduce a universal framework that disentangles these contributions via their distinct field-reversal symmetries and angular dependencies. Leveraging a 12-terminal Hall bar for independent control of the electric and in-plane magnetic field directions, we exemplify this method by analyzing the transverse electric voltage recorded on the the ferromagnetic Weyl semimetal Fe3Sn in an in-plane geometry. The standardized approach presented in this work will guide future studies of in-plane Hall responses in magnetic and topological materials.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通用框架，通过场反转对称性和角度依赖性来区分面内磁场产生的横向电压中不同物理机制的贡献（如各向异性和贝里曲率效应），并在铁磁Weyl半金属Fe3Sn中进行了实验验证。
AI.motivation: 面内磁场引起的电霍尔效应受到关注，但实验中测量的横向电压通常混杂了多种物理机制（如各向异性效应和贝里曲率效应）的贡献，导致信号解读存在歧义，亟需一种能够区分这些贡献的标准化方法。
AI.method: 利用12端霍尔棒实现对电场和面内磁场方向的独立控制，基于不同物理机制具有不同的场反转对称性和角度依赖性这一原理，建立通用解耦框架。
AI.result: 成功在铁磁Weyl半金属Fe3Sn的面内几何结构中区分了横向电压中的不同贡献成分，验证了该方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该标准化方法将为未来研究磁性及拓扑材料中的面内霍尔响应提供指导。

title: Critical Activation Voltage for Phonon-Mediated Field-Driven Phenomena
summary: Field-driven phenomena, from flash sintering to electromigration, exhibit threshold fields spanning six orders of magnitude. We show their product with the onset activation coherence length is a universal critical activation voltage, Vc =0.1-2.7 V. Vc represents the threshold electrical work required to resonantly couple to the universal phonon damping peak where lattice softening is maximized. This invariant unifies macroscopic thermal instabilities with the nanoscale Blech limit, establishing a universal phenomenological law for field-lattice coupling across 17 crystal families

AI.tldr: 本文发现场驱动现象（闪烧、电迁移等）的阈值场与激活相干长度的乘积是一个普适临界激活电压Vc≈0.1-2.7 V，该电压代表与声子阻尼峰共振耦合所需的阈值电功，统一了宏观热失稳与纳米尺度Blech极限。
AI.motivation: 场驱动现象（如闪烧、电迁移）的阈值场在六个数量级范围内变化，作者试图寻找一个普适的物理不变量来统一解释这些现象。
AI.method: 通过分析17种晶体家族中不同场驱动现象的阈值场与激活相干长度的乘积，发现其收敛于一个普适的临界激活电压Vc（0.1-2.7 V），并论证Vc代表与声子阻尼峰共振耦合所需的阈值电功。
AI.result: 发现了一个普适临界激活电压Vc=0.1-2.7 V，该电压统一了宏观热失稳与纳米尺度Blech极限，适用于17种晶体家族。
AI.conclusion: 建立了场-晶格耦合的普适唯象定律，为理解从闪烧到电迁移等多种场驱动现象提供了统一的理论框架。

title: Encounter times of random walkers with simultaneous resetting on networks
summary: In this work, we study the dynamics of multiple random walkers on networks subject to a simultaneous resetting protocol, whereby all walkers are synchronously returned to their respective initial nodes. For this collective Markovian process, we derive exact analytical expressions for the mean first-encounter time, defined as the average time required for all walkers to meet for the first time at a given node. These results are formulated in terms of the eigenvalues and eigenvectors of the transition matrices governing the dynamics without resetting, providing a clear spectral interpretation of the impact of resetting on encounter processes. We further establish a general criterion for finite networks that determines when the introduction of a nonzero resetting probability reduces the mean first-encounter time and leads to an optimal resetting strategy. The theoretical predictions are illustrated through numerical results on regular and heterogeneous networks, for encounters involving two or more walkers, and for combinations of local and nonlocal dynamics. Our findings demonstrate that simultaneous resetting can significantly reduce encounter times for specific target nodes and initial conditions, while becoming ineffective for highly exploratory dynamics or distant targets. A comparison with independent resetting shows that simultaneous resetting is more efficient in homogeneous networks, whereas independent resetting can outperform it in heterogeneous structures, thereby revealing a trade-off between synchronization and exploration. The framework provides a unified approach to collective search and encounter problems on networks with resetting.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了网络上多个随机游走者在同步重置协议下的首次相遇时间，推导了精确解析表达式，给出了重置策略的最优条件，并通过数值实验展示了同步重置与独立重置在不同网络结构中的效率差异。
AI.motivation: 理解多个随机游走者在同步重置协议下的相遇动力学，探究重置如何影响集体搜索与相遇过程，并比较同步重置与独立重置在不同网络结构中的效率。
AI.method: 利用转移矩阵的特征值与特征向量，推导了同步重置下多个随机游走者首次相遇时间的精确解析表达式；建立了有限网络下重置概率与相遇时间关系的通用判据；在正则网络和异质网络上进行数值模拟。
AI.result: 同步重置能显著减少特定目标节点和初始条件下的相遇时间，但对高探索性动力学或远距离目标效果不佳；在均匀网络中间步重置优于独立重置，而异质结构中独立重置可能更优。
AI.conclusion: 同步重置为集体搜索与相遇问题提供了一个统一的理论框架，揭示了同步与探索之间的权衡关系。

title: Unconventional Quantum Criticality in Long-Range Spin-1 Chains: Insights from Entanglement Entropy and Bipartite Fluctuations
summary: We study the ground-state phase diagram of a spin-1 Heisenberg chain with staggered long-range (LR) interactions decaying as $\propto r^{-α}$ using a quantum Monte Carlo approach based on the split-spin representation. This formulation enables efficient large-scale simulations by mapping the spin-1 model onto spin-$1/2$ degrees of freedom with local projection constraints. We resolve the continuous quantum phase transition between the gapped Haldane phase at large $α$ (short-range regime) and a gapless antiferromagnetically ordered Néel phase at small $α$ (LR regime), where the continuous SU(2) symmetry is broken. From finite-size scaling and crossing point analyses, we determine the critical point to be at $α_c = 2.48(2)$ and extract the associated critical exponents, which indicate unconventional criticality. In particular, the transition is found to be nonconformal, characterized by a dynamic exponent $z \neq 1$. We further analyze the scaling of entanglement entropy and bipartite fluctuations across the transition, and determine the corresponding universal scalings in both phases and at criticality.

AI.tldr: 本文利用基于分裂自旋表示的量子蒙特卡洛方法，研究了具有长程相互作用的自旋-1海森堡链的基态相图，发现从Haldane相到Néel相的连续量子相变，临界点α_c=2.48(2)，且该相变具有非共形临界性（z≠1）。
AI.motivation: 长程相互作用在量子自旋系统中会显著改变相图，但自旋-1链中长程相互作用的效应尚不清楚，尤其是Haldane相在长程相互作用下的稳定性以及可能的量子相变性质。
AI.method: 采用量子蒙特卡洛方法，基于分裂自旋表示将自旋-1模型映射为自旋-1/2自由度并施加局域投影约束，进行大规模模拟；通过有限尺寸标度和交叉点分析确定临界点，计算临界指数。
AI.result: 临界点α_c=2.48(2)，动态指数z≠1，表明该相变为非共形临界性；刻画了纠缠熵和二分涨落在两相及临界点的普适标度行为。
AI.conclusion: 长程相互作用可驱动自旋-1海森堡链从Haldane相到Néel相的连续量子相变，该相变具有非共形临界性，不同于传统的共形场论描述。

title: Intrinsic Magnetoelectric Hall Effect from Layer-Orbital Quantum Geometry
comment: 4 Figures + 1 Table. Comments and suggestions are most welcome
summary: Intrinsic Hall effects, such as the anomalous Hall effect, originate from the orbital quantum geometry of Bloch states. However, in layered materials, the combined action of out-of-plane electric and magnetic fields couples to layer polarization and orbital moment, generating a mixed layer-orbital quantum geometry in field-dressed Bloch states. We show that this geometry produces an intrinsic magnetoelectric Hall effect that is bilinear in the electric and magnetic fields. The response is scattering-time independent and can arise in nonmagnetic systems without spin-orbit coupling. Its origin lies in interband coherence involving layer polarization and orbital moment, leading to a finite, non-quantized Hall response that persists in the band gap. The Hall coefficient is odd under gate reversal and tracks layer polarization. A symmetry analysis identifies the classes of layered materials that host this effect. As a representative realization, we demonstrate the effect in rhombohedral pentalayer graphene, where the conductivity reaches values of order $0.05\,e^2/h$. These results establish mixed layer-orbital quantum geometry as a mechanism for intrinsic magnetoelectric Hall transport and a direct probe of layer-resolved quantum geometry in Bloch bands.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种由层-轨道混合量子几何产生的本征磁电霍尔效应，该效应在电场和磁场的联合作用下出现，无需自旋-轨道耦合，在菱方五层石墨烯中展现出约0.05 e²/h的电导率。
AI.motivation: 内在霍尔效应（如反常霍尔效应）源于布洛赫态的轨道量子几何，但在层状材料中，面外电场和磁场的联合作用会耦合层极化和轨道矩，产生场修饰布洛赫态中的混合层-轨道量子几何，进而催生新的本征磁电霍尔效应。
AI.method: 理论推导了电场和磁场双线性响应的本征磁电霍尔效应，证明其散射时间无关性；通过对称性分析识别了可产生该效应的层状材料类别；以菱方五层石墨烯作为代表性体系进行了数值验证。
AI.result: 该效应可在无磁性、无自旋-轨道耦合的体系中产生；霍尔响应非量子化，在带隙中持续存在；霍尔系数在栅极反转下为奇函数，并追踪层极化；在菱方五层石墨烯中电导率达到约0.05 e²/h。
AI.conclusion: 混合层-轨道量子几何是本征磁电霍尔输运的新机制，也是层分辨量子几何的直接探针。

title: Resonance-enhanced super-superexchange yields giant chiral magnon splitting in rutile altermagnets
summary: Altermagnets host momentum-selective spin splitting and chiral-split magnonic excitations despite vanishing net magnetization, enabling spin transport without ferromagnetism. In rutile structures, establishing altermagnetism spectroscopically has been challenging, motivating the search for a rutile platform with a resolvable exchange-driven chiral magnon splitting. Here we combine hybrid-functional first-principles calculations with linear spin-wave theory to show that rutile CuF$_2$ exhibits a meV-scale splitting between magnon modes of opposite chirality along momentum directions dictated by its $d$-wave altermagnetic symmetry. The splitting originates from an anomalously strong long-range super-superexchange channel Cu--F$\cdots$F--Cu, which enhances the symmetry-allowed difference between seventh-neighbour exchanges, $J_{7b} - J_{7a}$, controlling the chiral-mode splitting. We identify an orbital-resonance mechanism: energetic alignment between Cu $3d_{z^2}$ and F $2p_z$ states strengthens virtual hopping along the Cu--F$\cdots$F--Cu path and amplifies the anisotropic long-range exchange. Rutile CuF$_2$ therefore provides an ideal platform to validate rutile altermagnetism and suggests an orbital-energy description for engineering large chiral magnon splittings in insulating altermagnets.

AI.tldr: 本文通过第一性原理计算和自旋波理论，揭示了金红石CuF₂中由于超-超交换通道导致的手性磁子分裂，为验证金红石结构中的交变磁性提供了理想平台。
AI.motivation: 金红石结构中建立交变磁性光谱学证据具有挑战性，亟需一个可分辨交换驱动的手性磁子分裂的平台。
AI.method: 结合混合泛函第一性原理计算与线性自旋波理论，分析CuF₂的磁子能谱和交换相互作用。
