AI.result: 发现CuF₂存在meV量级的相反手性磁子模式分裂，源于增强的Cu-F⋯F-Cu超-超交换通道导致的各向异性长程交换（J₇ᵦ - J₇ₐ）。
AI.conclusion: 金红石CuF₂是验证交变磁性的理想平台，其轨道共振机制为设计绝缘交变磁体中大手性磁子分裂提供了新思路。

title: Arrow of Time as an indicator of Measurement-Induced Phase Transitions
summary: Measurement-induced phase transitions (MIPTs) in monitored quantum systems are typically diagnosed using entanglement-based measures. Here, we develop a complementary thermodynamic perspective based on the arrow of time (AoT), which arises from the intrinsic irreversibility of the quantum measurements driving these transitions. We study the AoT - defined as the logarithmic ratio of forward and backward trajectory probabilities - across a family of models exhibiting MIPTs. We find that, like entanglement entropy, the AoT is a nonlinear functional of the averaged density matrix; however, in contrast to entanglement, it is associated with a local operator. To determine whether the AoT exhibits critical behavior, we formulate and exactly solve a model of a random quantum circuit with non-projective measurements. This allows us to analytically demonstrate that the AoT displays nonanalytic behavior and identify its critical exponent. Our results establish the AoT as a novel diagnostic for phase transitions in monitored quantum systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出用"时间之箭"（AoT）——即前向与反向轨迹概率的对数比——作为监测量子系统中测量诱导相变（MIPT）的新诊断工具，并通过精确求解非投影测量随机量子电路模型，证明AoT具有非解析行为和临界指数。
AI.motivation: 现有MIPT的诊断主要依赖纠缠熵等纠缠度量，而纠缠熵是非局域且难以实验观测的。作者希望从热力学角度出发，利用量子测量固有的不可逆性（时间之箭）来诊断相变，寻找一种与局域算子关联的新诊断量。
AI.method: 定义AoT为前向与反向轨迹概率的对数比；注意到AoT与纠缠熵一样是平均密度矩阵的非线性泛函，但关联局域算子；构造并精确求解一个含非投影测量的随机量子电路模型，通过解析推导证明AoT的临界行为。
AI.result: 解析证明了AoT在相变点处呈现非解析行为，并识别了其临界指数，表明AoT能够有效刻画MIPT。
AI.conclusion: AoT可作为监测量子系统中相变的一种新型诊断工具，提供了与传统纠缠度量互补的热力学视角，且因其局域性更利于实验观测。

title: Acoustic quantum skyrmion-valley Hall effect
summary: Skyrmions are particle-like topological textures that hold great promise for low-power electronics and wave-based functionalities. Yet their utility is hindered by the lack of robust and controllable transport. Here, we show that band topology can be harnessed to overcome this limitation. We experimentally realize an acoustic quantum skyrmion--valley Hall effect in a surface phononic crystal via engineered spin--orbit--momentum interaction. Skyrmions emerge as valley-locked topological edge states, robustly propagating along designed domain walls. Crucially, the skyrmion transport exhibits concurrent orbital angular momentum (OAM)--valley locking and spin--texture locking, enabling controllable propagation through selective excitation. Our results establish a direct correspondence between real-space and momentum-space topology, providing a general strategy for robust, controllable skyrmion transport.

AI.tldr: 本文在声子晶体中实验实现了声学量子斯格明子-谷霍尔效应，通过自旋-轨道-动量耦合，使斯格明子作为谷锁定的拓扑边缘态沿畴壁稳健传播，并展示了轨道角动量-谷锁定和自旋纹理锁定，实现了可控传输。
AI.motivation: 斯格明子作为拓扑纹理有望用于低功耗电子学和波动功能器件，但其稳健可控的传输一直受限于现有方案，亟需新机制突破。
AI.method: 在表面声子晶体中通过设计自旋-轨道-动量相互作用，利用能带拓扑实现声学量子斯格明子-谷霍尔效应，使斯格明子以谷锁定的拓扑边缘态形式沿设计好的畴壁传播。
AI.result: 实现了斯格明子的轨道角动量-谷锁定和自旋纹理锁定，通过选择性激发可控制其传播；建立了实空间与动量空间拓扑之间的直接对应关系。
AI.conclusion: 该工作提供了一种利用能带拓扑实现稳健可控斯格明子传输的通用策略。

title: Layer-mediated tuning of spin and valley physics in stacked tetragonal altermagnetic bilayers
summary: As an emerging magnetic phase, altermagnets (AMs) with collinear compensated magnetism in real space and alternating spin splitting in the band structure have attracted widespread attention. Here, based on first-principles calculations, we demonstrate that the layer stacking imposes symmetry constraints on the spin and valley degrees of freedom (DOFs) in an AM bilayer composed of two tetragonal altermagnetic monolayers, thereby enabling the tuning of these DOFs through interlayer sliding as well as by an external electric field. Using several representative AM bilayers, we reveal that the [C2||P] and [C2||Mz] symmetries intrinsically enforce spin degeneracy, while the coupling between spin and layer DOFs establishes a general framework for achieving electric field control of spin states. Appropriate interlayer sliding breaks the [C2||Md] symmetry of AM bilayers, thereby giving rise to a spontaneous valley splitting and driving a transition to a fully compensated ferrimagnetic state. Furthermore, owing to the tunable valley splitting induced by interlayer sliding, enhanced tunneling magnetoresistance (TMR) can be realized by AM bilayers. This work highlights the intrinsic correlation among spin, valley, and layer DOFs, offering symmetry-based design principles for layer-based spintronic and valleytronic devices.

AI.tldr: 本文通过第一性原理计算，揭示了层堆叠对交错磁体（AM）双层结构中自旋和谷自由度的对称性约束，证明了层间滑动和外电场可有效调控这些自由度，并实现了自发谷劈裂及增强的隧穿磁电阻效应。
AI.motivation: 交错磁体（AM）作为一种新兴磁相具有独特的自旋分裂特性，但如何在二维异质结构中有效调控其自旋与谷自由度尚不明确，亟需建立基于对称性的设计原理。
AI.method: 基于第一性原理计算，构建由两个四方交错磁单层组成的AM双层结构，分析[C2||P]、[C2||Mz]和[C2||Md]等对称性对自旋和谷自由度的约束，并通过层间滑动和外电场进行调控。
AI.result: [C2||P]和[C2||Mz]对称性强制自旋简并；自旋与层自由度的耦合实现了电场控制自旋态；层间滑动可打破[C2||Md]对称性，产生自发谷劈裂并驱动完全补偿亚铁磁转变；可调谷劈裂增强了隧穿磁电阻效应。
AI.conclusion: 该工作揭示了自旋、谷和层自由度之间的内在关联，为基于对称性设计层状自旋电子学和谷电子学器件提供了理论指导。

title: Symplectic connection third-order Hall effect in a room-temperature ferromagnet
comment: The submitted version for review on April 30, 2025. 22 pages, 5 figures
summary: Third-order nonlinear Hall effects (THE) have recently attracted considerable experimental interest as powerful probes for quantum geometric properties in emergent quantum materials, encompassing quadrupole moments of quantum metric and Berry curvature. Here, we report a fundamentally new THE in room-temperature van der Waals ferromagnet Fe3GaTe2 from second-order Berry connection polarizability, which manifests a higher-order characterization of band geometry called symplectic connection. Our observations show that the third-order transverse response in Fe3GaTe2 is odd to magnetization, vanishes above the Curie temperature and remains independent of driving current directions. Scaling law analysis combined with first-principles calculations establishes this response as the symplectic-connection-induced THE. This discovery opens the door to probing high-order quantum geometric properties beyond Berry curvature and quantum metric through nonlinear transport, unveiling the potential of exploring nonlinear Hall phenomena in broad classes of magnets without breaking inversion symmetry. Moreover, the room-temperature manipulation of THE holds promises for device applications based on harnessing the quantum-geometric connection structure.

AI.tldr: 本文报道了室温范德瓦尔斯铁磁体Fe3GaTe2中一种全新的三阶非线性霍尔效应，该效应源于二阶贝里联络极化率所表征的辛联络（symplectic connection），超越了传统的量子度量和贝里曲率，可在室温下操控，为探索高阶量子几何性质和非线性输运提供了新平台。
AI.motivation: 三阶非线性霍尔效应（THE）是探测量子材料中量子几何性质（如量子度量和贝里曲率的四极矩）的有力工具，但已有机制有限。作者希望探索是否存在新的、更高阶的量子几何机制驱动的THE，特别是在室温磁性材料中。
AI.method: 实验上在室温范德瓦尔斯铁磁体Fe3GaTe2中测量三阶横向输运响应，结合标度律分析和第一性原理计算，确定该响应源自辛联络（symplectic connection）诱导的THE，即由二阶贝里联络极化率贡献。
AI.result: 发现Fe3GaTe2的三阶横向响应对磁化呈奇函数，在居里温度以上消失，且与驱动电流方向无关。标度律分析和第一性原理计算证实该响应为辛联络诱导的三阶非线性霍尔效应。
AI.conclusion: 该发现开辟了通过非线性输运探测超越贝里曲率和量子度量的高阶量子几何性质的新途径，揭示在无需打破反演对称性的磁性材料中探索非线性霍尔现象的潜力，且室温可操控特性对基于量子几何联络结构的器件应用具有重要意义。

title: Crystal structure prediction with nuclear quantum and finite-temperature effects via deep free energy learning
summary: Accurate crystal structure prediction (CSP) requires accounting for finite-temperature and nuclear quantum effects, yet first-principles evaluation of the free energy surface (FES) remains prohibitive for high-throughput searches. We observe that the self-consistent harmonic approximation (SCHA) FES, as a function of nuclear centroid positions, shares the same mathematical structure as a potential-energy surface and can therefore be directly learned by a deep neural network potential. The resulting deep free energy (DF) model, constructed via a two-level concurrent-learning workflow, evaluates free energies, forces, and stresses in a single forward pass. Applied to the La-Sc-H system at 200 GPa and 300 K, DF-based CSP reproduces the stability of the experimentally observed LaH10 and LaSc2H24, and discovers an unreported thermodynamically stable clathrate hydride: P4/mmm LaScH8. Benchmarked on the LaH10 system, the DF model achieves a 1.72*10^6-fold cost reduction relative to DFT-level SSCHA. The DF framework provides a scalable route for incorporating finite-temperature and nuclear quantum effects into high-throughput crystal structure prediction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出深度自由能（DF）框架，通过自洽谐波近似（SCHA）自由能面与深度神经网络势的结合，实现了在高温和核量子效应下高效进行晶体结构预测。在La-Sc-H体系中，该方法成功复现了已知超导氢化物LaH10和LaSc2H24的稳定性，并发现了新型热力学稳定笼状氢化物P4/mmm LaScH8，同时将计算成本降低了172万倍。
AI.motivation: 精确的晶体结构预测需要考虑有限温度和核量子效应，但第一性原理评估自由能面的计算成本过高，难以用于高通量搜索。传统方法无法在保持精度的同时实现高效的自由能计算。
AI.method: 提出了深度自由能（DF）模型，利用SCHA自由能面与势能面具有相同数学结构的特性，用深度神经网络势直接学习自由能面。采用两阶段并发学习工作流构建模型，使其能够在单次前向传播中输出自由能、力和应力。
AI.result: 在200 GPa和300 K条件下，DF模型成功复现了LaH10和LaSc2H24的实验稳定性，发现了新型稳定笼状氢化物P4/mmm LaScH8。在LaH10系统基准测试中，计算成本相比DFT级别的SSCHA降低了172万倍。
AI.conclusion: DF框架为在高通量晶体结构预测中纳入有限温度和核量子效应提供了一种可扩展的途径，在保持精度的同时大幅降低了计算成本。

title: Quantum Optical Signatures of Band Topology in Solid-State High Harmonics
summary: We develop a general theory of high-harmonic generation (HHG) in solid-state systems, based on a weak-correlation expansion of photonic and matter degrees of freedom. Unlike standard HHG theories, which treat light-matter dynamics through the Schrodinger equation, our approach employs density-matrix evolution, naturally capturing the mixed-state character of both the field and the matter - a critical aspect for describing complex solid-state band structures. We show explicitly that the properties of the emitted fields are governed by the quantum statistics and quantum geometry of the underlying solid. Taking the Su-Schrieffer-Heeger (SSH) model in a one-sided optical cavity as a paradigmatic example and considering the dual regime, we demonstrate that in the topological phase a system exhibits a stronger HHG response and stronger quantum-light signatures than in the trivial phase. Furthermore, we show that cavity-matter interaction gives rise to squeezed high-harmonic quantum light, whose properties are directly imprinted by the current-current fluctuations in the material system. Crucially, the observed squeezing does not rely on a separate quartic Kerr mechanism. In the mesoscopic regime, the genuine quantum Kerr term is higher order in light-matter coupling strength and negligible, while the relevant non-classical effect is governed by current-current fluctuations encoded in the complex susceptibility of the material. This work establishes a direct link between band topology and photon statistics, opening new avenues for topology-sensitive quantum light generation and photon statistics based spectroscopy of solid-state systems.

AI.tldr: 本文发展了一套基于密度矩阵演化的固体高次谐波产生（HHG）理论，揭示了带拓扑结构与光子统计之间的直接联系，并展示了拓扑相中更强的HHG响应和量子光压缩特性。
AI.motivation: 现有固体HHG理论多基于薛定谔方程处理光-物质动力学，无法自然描述场与物质的混合态特性，尤其难以处理复杂固体能带结构中的量子统计和量子几何效应。
AI.method: 采用光与物质自由度的弱关联展开方法，基于密度矩阵演化框架，以SSH模型在单侧光学腔中的双稳态为例进行分析。
AI.result: 拓扑相中HHG响应和量子光特征强于平庸相；腔-物质相互作用产生压缩的高次谐波量子光，其性质由材料中电流-电流涨落决定，且无需依赖四阶Kerr非线性。
AI.conclusion: 建立了带拓扑结构与光子统计之间的直接联系，为拓扑敏感的量子光产生和基于光子统计的固体光谱学开辟了新途径。

title: Spin-wave hybridization in bismuth iron garnet Mie spheres induced by the inverse Faraday effect
comment: 10 pages in total (including metadata), 8 pages of the paper, 4 figures, to be published in Photonics and Nanostructures -- Fundamentals and Applications
summary: We show that the inverse Faraday effect can be used to engineer dipole--exchange spin-wave spectra in ferrimagnetic bismuth iron garnet (BIG) Mie spheres. Internal optical Mie resonances generate spatially structured effective magnetic fields whose symmetry is inherited from the optical near field and which act as controllable perturbations of the magnon Hamiltonian. For circularly polarized light incident collinearly with the equilibrium magnetization, the optical perturbation preserves axial symmetry while breaking mirror parity, thereby enabling hybridization of magnon modes with opposite parity within the same $\widehat{J}_z$ sector. Using coupled-mode theory, we derive the corresponding avoided-crossing spectrum and analytical expressions for the induced level splittings, which scale linearly with pump intensity. Numerical calculations for BIG spheres confirm the predicted hybridization and show that the splitting is maximized near optical Mie resonances, where field enhancement and magneto-optical response are strongest. We further discuss the roles of damping, linewidth, and heating, and show that the predicted MHz--hundreds-of-MHz splittings should be observable under realistic conditions. These results identify BIG Mie resonators as a promising platform for symmetry-selective optical control of spin-wave spectra.

AI.tldr: 本文展示了利用逆法拉第效应在铁磁性铋铁石榴石（BIG）Mie球体中工程化偶极-交换自旋波谱。光学Mie共振产生的有效磁场具有光学近场的对称性，可作为磁振子哈密顿量的可控微扰。圆偏振光与平衡磁化共线入射时，光学微扰保持轴对称性但破坏镜像对称性，从而允许同一角动量投影扇区内相反宇称的磁振子模式发生杂化。通过耦合模理论推导了避免交叉谱和诱导能级分裂的解析表达式，数值计算证实了杂化现象，并表明在Mie共振附近分裂最大。在合理条件下可观测到MHz至数百MHz的能级分裂。
AI.motivation: 探索利用光场对称性选择性控制自旋波谱的新机制，特别是通过逆法拉第效应在介观Mie谐振器中实现磁振子模式的对称性选择性杂化与调控。
AI.method: 采用耦合模理论分析光学微扰下的磁振子谱，结合数值计算（BIG球体）验证理论预测，并考虑阻尼、线宽和加热效应以评估实验可行性。
AI.result: 推导了避免交叉谱和能级分裂的解析表达式（分裂与泵浦强度线性相关）；数值计算证实了相反宇称磁振子模式的杂化；分裂在Mie共振附近最大化；预测在合理条件下可达到MHz至数百MHz的可观测分裂。
AI.conclusion: BIG Mie谐振器为对称性选择性的自旋波谱光学控制提供了一个有前景的平台，实现了光场对称性向磁振子动力学的可控传递。

title: LLM-guided phase diagram construction through high-throughput experimentation
summary: Constructing phase diagrams for multicomponent alloys requires extensive experimental measurements and is a time-consuming task. Here we investigate whether large language models (LLMs) can guide experimental planning for phase diagram construction. In our framework, a general-purpose LLM serves as the experimental planner, suggesting compositions for measurement at each cycle in a closed loop with high-throughput synthesis and X-ray diffraction phase identification. Using this framework, we experimentally constructed the ternary phase diagram of the Co-Al-Ge system at 900 degree C through iterative synthesis and characterization. We compared two strategies that differ in how the initial compositions are selected: one uses predictions from a domain-specific LLM trained on phase diagram data (aLLoyM), while the other relies solely on the general-purpose LLM. The two strategies exhibited complementary strengths. aLLoyM directed the initial measurements toward compositionally complex regions in the interior of the ternary diagram, enabling the earliest discovery of all three novel phases that form only in the ternary system. In contrast, the general-purpose LLM adopted a textbook-like approach which efficiently identified a larger number of phases in fewer cycles. In addition, a simulated benchmark comparing the LLM against conventional machine learning confirmed that the LLM achieves more efficient exploration. The results demonstrate that LLMs have high potential as experimental planners for phase diagram construction.

AI.tldr: 本文探索利用大型语言模型（LLM）作为实验规划器，通过闭环迭代合成与X射线衍射，加速构建多组分合金相图。在Co-Al-Ge三元体系900°C相图构建中，通用LLM与领域专用LLM（aLLoyM）两种策略互补：aLLoyM擅长发现三元体系中的新相，通用LLM则高效识别更多已知相。模拟实验表明LLM优于传统机器学习方法。
AI.motivation: 传统多组分合金相图构建依赖大量实验测量，耗时费力。作者希望利用LLM的推理与规划能力，引导实验探索过程，减少所需实验次数，加速相图构建。
AI.method: 提出闭环框架：通用LLM作为实验规划器，每次循环建议待测成分；结合高通量合成与X射线衍射进行相鉴定。对比两种初始成分选择策略：1）基于领域专用LLM（aLLoyM）的预测；2）仅依赖通用LLM。同时构建模拟基准，与常规机器学习方法对比。
AI.result: aLLoyM策略引导初始测量进入三元相图内部复杂区域，最早发现所有三种仅在三元体系中形成的新相；通用LLM采用教科书式探索，在更少轮次内识别了更多相。模拟基准显示LLM探索效率优于常规机器学习。
AI.conclusion: LLM作为相图构建的实验规划器具有高潜力，两种策略各有优势，未来可探索结合二者优势的混合方法。

title: Microscopic modeling of flopping-mode quantum dot spin qubits
summary: We present a semi-analytical microscopic modeling framework for flopping-mode spin qubits, with which we capture the spatial properties of their double-well confinement and electromagnetic environment beyond conventional low-energy approximations. Our framework enables a direct mapping from the device geometry to qubit parameters and metrics. By using this approach, we simulate electric dipole spin resonance-based single-qubit control and evaluate the frequency and spectral purity of the Rabi oscillations across different parameter regimes. Our analysis reveals a fundamental tradeoff between fast electrical driving and clean single-mode Rabi oscillations. We also investigate two-qubit control by considering two capacitively coupled flopping-mode qubits and derive the corresponding exchange interaction with an appropriately restricted configuration interaction treatment. Our approach reveals the interplay between the spatial profile of the double-well confinement, magnetic field gradient, and Coulomb interaction, which together govern the effective exchange coupling strength. Our microscopic modeling framework enables efficient exploration of large parameter spaces and provides design guidelines for optimizing flopping-mode spin qubits in realistic architectures. This framework can also be generalized in a straightforward manner to other electrically controlled spin qubit platforms.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个半解析微观建模框架，用于描述翻转模式自旋量子比特，能够直接映射器件几何结构到量子比特参数，并揭示了快速电驱动与纯净单模拉比振荡之间的基本权衡，同时研究了双量子比特控制中的交换耦合机制。
AI.motivation: 现有低能近似方法无法充分捕捉翻转模式自旋量子比特的双阱约束空间特性和电磁环境，需要一种能够从器件几何结构直接映射到量子比特参数的微观建模框架。
AI.method: 提出了半解析微观建模框架，结合双阱约束的空间特性和电磁环境，使用电偶极自旋共振模拟单量子比特控制，并采用适当限制的组态相互作用处理推导双量子比特的交换耦合。
AI.result: 发现了快速电驱动与纯净单模拉比振荡之间存在基本权衡；揭示了双阱约束空间轮廓、磁场梯度和库仑相互作用对交换耦合强度的共同影响。
AI.conclusion: 该框架能够高效探索大参数空间，为优化翻转模式自旋量子比特提供设计指导，并可推广到其他电控自旋量子比特平台。

title: Multilayer Laue Lenses for Enhanced Spatial Resolution in Dark-Field X-ray Microscopy
summary: We introduce the use of a crossed pair of Multilayer Laue Lenses (MLLs) as an objective in Dark-Field X-ray Microscopy (DFXM). In a demonstration experiment at the ID03 beamline at ESRF, two flat Mo-Si MLLs were used, with a physical aperture of 50 x 50 $\mathrm{μm^2}$ and a focal length of 14.25 mm at 19 keV. Applying a 10 % criterion to the Modulation Transfer Functions (MTFs) acquired, a spatial resolution of 56 nm is obtained in bright-field mode -- more than three times better than with a compound refractive lens (CRL) objective. The dark-field resolution is similar. With an efficiency of 26.7 % the MLL objective expands the science domain of DFXM significantly, both for bulk and near-surface studies. Similar to the CRL case, the reciprocal space resolution is dominated by the numerical aperture (NA) of the objective, with the NA being three times larger in the MLL case. This enables faster orientation mapping and implies improved options for the use of tomographic reconstruction algorithms. Although the MLL objective pupil varies with energy and position, secondary peaks are suppressed, simplifying both interpretation and forward simulations. We present an example DFXM application using the MLL as an objective, imaging a through-silicon via Kelvin device.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了将交叉多层劳厄透镜（MLLs）用作暗场X射线显微镜（DFXM）物镜的方法。实验表明，与复合折射透镜（CRL）相比，MLL物镜在亮场模式下空间分辨率提升三倍以上（56 nm），效率达26.7%，并显著扩展了DFXM的科学应用领域。
AI.motivation: 现有的暗场X射线显微镜在使用复合折射透镜（CRL）作为物镜时，空间分辨率和数值孔径（NA）受到限制，难以满足更高分辨率和更快取向映射的需求。因此，作者引入交叉多层劳厄透镜（MLLs）作为替代物镜，以提升DFXM的性能。
AI.method: 在ESRF的ID03光束线上，使用两个平面Mo-Si MLL（物理孔径50×50 μm²，焦距14.25 mm，能量19 keV）构成交叉对作为DFXM物镜。通过调制传递函数（MTF）的10%判据评估空间分辨率，并与CRL物镜进行对比。
AI.result: 亮场模式下空间分辨率达56 nm，比CRL物镜提升三倍以上；暗场分辨率相似；效率为26.7%；数值孔径（NA）比CRL大三倍，支持更快的取向映射和更好的层析重建能力。MLL物镜的次级峰被抑制，简化了解释和正向模拟。
AI.conclusion: MLL物镜显著提升了DFXM的空间分辨率、效率和数值孔径，扩展了其在块体材料和近表面研究中的科学应用范围，并为取向映射和层析重建提供了更好的支持。

authors: Herre S. J. van der Zant
title: Memristive Switches in Rigid Conjugated Single-Molecule Junctions
summary: Voltage-driven memristive switching has been reported in molecular junctions, yet its microscopic origin often remains elusive. Here, we study three rigid OPE-like derivatives that lack an obvious internal switching pathway using mechanically controlled break junctions (MCBJs) and observe non-volatile, bistable hysteretic IV characteristics at cryogenic temperature. We introduce a quantitative analysis workflow that classifies memristive IVs, clusters the two conductance states, and extracts switching features and stability metrics from repeated measurements at fixed displacement. While all molecules exhibit memristive behavior, stability and hysteresis reproducibility depend strongly on anchoring and connectivity: the linear biphenyl backbone with thiolate (SAc) anchoring shows the most reproducible, predominantly field-driven hysteresis, whereas the meta-phenyl variant with thioether (SMe) anchoring is dominated by stochastic, current-driven events. The resulting conductance statistics point to an extrinsic, mechanically mediated origin involving contact rearrangements, multi-molecule transport, blinking (open-closed) contacts, injection-point shifts, and $π$-$π$-stacking dimerization.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了三种刚性OPE类衍生物在低温下的忆阻开关行为，开发了一套定量分析流程，发现其忆阻特性源于外部的机械介导机制（如接触重构、多分子输运等），而非分子内部的固有开关路径。
AI.motivation: 分子结中电压驱动的忆阻开关已被报道，但其微观机制常常不明确，尤其缺乏对无明显内部开关路径的分子的系统性理解。
AI.method: 采用机械可控断裂结（MCBJs）在低温下测量三种刚性OPE衍生物的电流-电压特性，并开发了一套定量分析流程：分类忆阻IV曲线、聚类两个电导状态、提取开关特征和稳定性指标。
AI.result: 所有分子均表现出忆阻行为，但稳定性和滞回可重复性强烈依赖于锚定基团和连接方式：线性联苯骨架+硫醇锚定显示出最可重复的场驱动滞回，而间位苯基+硫醚锚定则表现为随机性电流驱动事件。
AI.conclusion: 忆阻开关的根源是外部的机械介导机制（接触重构、多分子输运、闪烁接触、注入点移动、π-π堆叠二聚化等），而非分子内部固有开关路径。

title: Fluctuation-driven multi-step charge density wave transition in monolayer TiSe$_2$
summary: The exact microscopic origin, symmetry, and thermal melting mechanism of the charge density wave (CDW) phase in TiSe$_{2}$ remain a subject of intense debate, particularly regarding the presence of chiral structural order and a multi-step phase transition. Here, we resolve the finite-temperature structural dynamics of the monolayer TiSe$_{2}$ using large-scale molecular dynamics simulations driven by an accurate, first-principles-trained machine-learning interatomic potential. We demonstrate that the CDW melting deviates from a conventional second-order phase transition, while it undergoes a two-step melting process characterised by an extended fluctuation regime between $T^{\ast}\approx200$ K and $T_{\mathrm{CDW}}\approx250$ K, with proliferation of topological defects and domain walls, and accompanied by a completely overdamped soft optical phonon. Furthermore, we reveal that anisotropic long-wavelength thermal fluctuations spontaneously stabilise an asymmetric $3Q$ chiral CDW order with $C2$ symmetry. These findings provide a unified microscopic framework for understanding complex fluctuation-driven phase transitions in 2D quantum materials, demonstrating that the intricate CDW physics of TiSe$_{2}$ can be largely captured without invoking excitonic correlations.

AI.tldr: 本文利用基于第一性原理训练的机器学习势函数，通过大规模分子动力学模拟，揭示了单层TiSe₂中电荷密度波（CDW）的熔化并非传统二级相变，而是一个两步熔化过程，涉及拓扑缺陷和畴壁的增殖，并在高温下自发稳定了具有C2对称性的手性3Q CDW有序相。
AI.motivation: TiSe₂中CDW相的微观起源、对称性和热熔化机制存在激烈争论，特别是关于手性结构序和多步相变的存在问题，亟待澄清。
AI.method: 采用基于第一性原理训练的机器学习原子间势，进行大规模分子动力学模拟，解析单层TiSe₂的有限温度结构动力学。
AI.result: CDW熔化偏离传统二级相变，呈现两步熔化过程：在T*≈200 K到TCDW≈250 K之间存在扩展的涨落区间，伴有拓扑缺陷和畴壁增殖及完全过阻尼的软光学声子；各向异性的长波长热涨落自发稳定了具有C2对称性的非对称3Q手性CDW有序。
AI.conclusion: 为理解二维量子材料中涨落驱动的复杂相变提供了统一的微观框架，表明TiSe₂的CDW物理在很大程度上无需引入激子关联即可被捕捉。

title: Disorder induced time-reversal-odd nonlinear spin and orbital Hall effects
summary: We develop a theory for the second-order time-reversal-odd ($\mathcal{T}$-odd) angular-momentum current, incorporating both spin and orbital components. We reveal that besides spin and orbital Berry curvature dipoles, $\mathcal{T}$-odd nonlinear angular-momentum current can originate from disorder-induced mechanisms including coordinate shift, side-jump spin and orbital currents, anomalous scattering amplitude, and skew scattering. A general scaling relation is derived to help distinguish some of these contributions in experiments. Model calculations demonstrate that the orbital component can be comparable to and much larger than the spin component. Our theory lays the groundwork for $\mathcal{T}$-odd nonlinear spin and orbital transport.

AI.tldr: 本文建立了含自旋和轨道分量的二阶时间反演奇角动量流理论，揭示了除贝里曲率偶极子外，无序诱导机制（坐标位移、侧跳、反常散射振幅、斜散射）也能产生非线性角动量流，并推导了标度关系。模型计算表明轨道分量可与自旋分量相当或更大。
AI.motivation: 目前对时间反演奇非线性角动量输运的理解主要集中在贝里曲率偶极子等本征贡献上，而无序诱导的非本征贡献（特别是轨道角动量部分）缺乏系统理论框架。
AI.method: 基于量子输运理论，系统分析了无序诱导的各种散射机制（坐标位移、侧跳、反常散射振幅、斜散射）对二阶时间反演奇角动量流的贡献，并推导了区分不同贡献的普适标度关系。
AI.result: 发现轨道角动量流在非线性输运中可以达到与自旋角动量流相当甚至更大的量级，这挑战了以往研究对自旋成分的侧重。
AI.conclusion: 该理论为时间反演奇非线性自旋和轨道输运研究奠定了基础，为实验区分不同贡献提供了标度关系这一有力工具。

title: Topological Word for Non-Abelian Topological Insulators
summary: We propose a unified framework, dubbed topological word, for the complete non-Abelian bulk-boundary correspondence in multigap non-Abelian topological insulators. Composed by an ordered sequence of letters, each a non-Abelian charge depicting the gap-resolved topology, the topological word captures both the global non-Abelian topology corresponding to the homotopy classification, and the band-adjacency information. The latter, though crucial for the edge-state pattern across multiple gaps, is often overlooked in previous studies. We confirm our framework using both static models and periodically driven Floquet systems, and discuss its connection and distinction with existing descriptions, such as the phase-band singularities and braiding representations. Intriguingly, topological word continues to provide insight regarding topology and edge states, even as the global non-Abelian topology becomes ill-defined under broken parity-time symmetry.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了"拓扑词"统一框架，用于描述多能隙非阿贝尔拓扑绝缘体中的完整非阿贝尔体-边对应关系。该框架由有序非阿贝尔电荷序列构成，同时捕捉全局非阿贝尔拓扑和能带邻接信息，并通过静态模型和Floquet系统验证，在PT对称性破缺时仍能描述拓扑和边缘态。
AI.motivation: 以往研究常忽略能带邻接信息，而该信息对多能隙间的边缘态模式至关重要。作者旨在提供一个统一框架，同时捕捉全局拓扑和能带邻接信息，弥补现有描述的不足。
AI.method: 提出"拓扑词"框架，由有序非阿贝尔电荷字母序列构成；通过静态模型和周期驱动Floquet系统进行验证；与相位带奇点和编织表示等现有描述进行对比分析。
AI.result: 拓扑词成功捕捉了同伦分类对应的全局非阿贝尔拓扑和能带邻接信息；在PT对称性破缺、全局非阿贝尔拓扑失效的情况下，仍能提供拓扑和边缘态的相关洞见。
AI.conclusion: 拓扑词是描述多能隙非阿贝尔拓扑绝缘体体-边对应的有效统一框架，能处理现有方法忽略的能带邻接信息，且在对称性破缺时仍具适用性。

title: Phonon driven non-equilibrium triggers for thermal runaway in battery electrodes
summary: Thermal runaway in lithium-ion batteries is governed by the poorly-understood initiation phase, where localised heating introduces instability. Here we identify the three key components that trigger thermal runaway, decreases in local conductivity, heat capacity changes, and intercalation heating, which significantly increase temperature gradients that accelerate battery degradation. Using a multiscale framework that links atomistic phonon calculations with grain-resolved thermal modelling, we identify large thermal gradients across grain boundaries arising from external heating events and intercalation-dependent thermal properties of Li$_x$ZrS$_2$. The observed changes in thermal conductivity are due to charge redistribution and bond-strength modulation of the host, in contrast to the existing theory of lithium rattler mechanics. Internal heating events driven by intercalation gives rise to local thermal gradients, finite-speed thermal wave interference, and internal thermal fluctuations that generate mechanical strain and sub-grain thermal breakdown. These results show that the trigger for thermal runaway is controlled by internal grain architecture and composition, as well as the external environment. Our findings establish materials and electrode design rules for suppressing hotspot formation and improving battery safety during fast charging.

AI.tldr: 本文通过多尺度框架识别了锂离子电池热失控的三个关键触发因素（局部电导率下降、热容变化和插层加热），发现热梯度在晶界处显著增大，并揭示了热导率变化的机制是电荷重新分布和键强调制而非传统"锂摇铃"理论，为抑制热点形成和提升电池安全性提供了材料与电极设计准则。
AI.motivation: 锂离子电池热失控的引发阶段理解不足，局部加热带来的不稳定性机制尚不明确，亟需识别关键触发因素以提升电池安全性。
AI.method: 采用多尺度框架，将原子尺度声子计算与晶粒分辨热建模相结合，研究Li$_x$ZrS$_2$中外部加热事件和插层依赖热性质对热梯度的影响。
AI.result: 识别出热失控的三个关键触发因素：局部电导率下降、热容变化和插层加热；发现热导率变化源于电荷重新分布和键强调制；观察到插层驱动的内部加热导致局部热梯度、有限速热波干涉和内部热涨落，产生机械应变和亚晶粒热击穿。
AI.conclusion: 热失控触发由内部晶粒结构和成分以及外部环境共同控制，研究结果为抑制热点形成和改进快速充电下电池安全性提供了材料与电极设计准则。

title: Including nanoparticle shape into macrospin models
summary: We investigate the feasibility of the macrospin approximation to account for the actual shape of soft magnetic nanoparticles (MNPs) with realistic geometries. Specifically focusing on magnetite, we use the superellipsoidal parametrisation to account for a variety of shapes, with a continuous interpolation from spherical to cubic morphologies, as well as different elongations. Our procedure consists of the direct comparison between angular-dependent hysteresis loops obtained by full micromagnetic simulations, with those produced by an extended Stoner-Wohlfarth (SW) model that incorporates both the intrinsic cubic magnetocrystalline anisotropy, and an effective uniaxial contribution arising from the particle elongation. The limits of validity of the macrospin description are approximately 10-60 nm for axial ratios r>1.5, and 20-60 nm for 1.0<r<1.5. These results establish a direct connection between nanoparticle morphology and effective macrospin parameters, demonstrating the suitability of the generalized SW model for describing the magnetic response of realistically shaped MNPs.

AI.tldr: 本文通过超椭球参数化模拟真实形状的磁铁矿纳米颗粒，将微磁模拟与扩展Stoner-Wohlfarth模型对比，确定了宏观自旋近似在不同粒径和长径比下的有效范围（10-60 nm），建立了纳米颗粒形态与宏观自旋参数间的直接联系。
AI.motivation: 验证宏观自旋近似在描述真实几何形状的软磁纳米颗粒（如磁铁矿）磁性响应时的可行性，建立纳米颗粒形态与有效宏观自旋参数之间的桥梁。
AI.method: 采用超椭球参数化描述从球形到立方体连续过渡的多种形状及不同伸长率，通过对比全微磁模拟与扩展Stoner-Wohlfarth模型（含立方磁晶各向异性和有效单轴各向异性）的角度依赖磁滞回线，确定宏观自旋描述的适用范围。
AI.result: 宏观自旋描述的适用范围为：长径比r>1.5时约10-60 nm，1.0<r<1.5时约20-60 nm。
AI.conclusion: 研究建立了纳米颗粒形态与有效宏观自旋参数的直接关联，证明了广义Stoner-Wohlfarth模型适用于描述真实形状磁纳米颗粒的磁响应。

title: Accurate and Efficient Interatomic Potentials for Dislocations in InP
summary: We present Atomic Cluster Expansion (ACE) and MACE models trained on a new dataset of Density Functional Theory (DFT) calculations, constructed for the task of studying the mobility of dislocations in Indium Phosphide (InP). The models are validated in a suite of tests against RSCAN DFT, and compared with previously published potentials from literature. Our new models act as much better surrogates for DFT than the literature models: errors on partial dislocation formation energies are at most 4% for both ACE and MACE, compared with 18% for the MACE-MPA foundation model and 42-50% for earlier bespoke potentials. The bespoke MACE model achieves this accuracy while being around five times faster to evaluate than the MP0 and MPA foundation models.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了针对磷化铟（InP）中位错迁移率研究而开发的ACE和MACE机器学习势模型，基于新的DFT数据集训练，在精度上显著优于已有势模型，且MACE模型速度比基础模型快约5倍。
AI.motivation: 现有的势模型在描述InP位错行为时精度不足（部分位错形成能误差高达42-50%），需要更高精度且计算高效的替代模型来研究位错迁移率。
AI.method: 构建了新的DFT数据集，用于训练ACE（原子团簇展开）和MACE（消息传递神经网络）模型，并通过与RSCAN DFT的对比测试以及文献中现有势模型的比较进行验证。
AI.result: ACE和MACE模型的部分位错形成能误差仅为4%以内，而MACE-MPA基础模型误差为18%，早期特制势模型误差为42-50%；定制的MACE模型评估速度比MP0和MPA基础模型快约5倍。
AI.conclusion: 新训练的ACE和MACE模型在精度和效率上均优于现有势模型，为InP位错迁移率研究提供了可靠的DFT替代方案。

title: Bulk and surface electronic structure of MoAlB(010)
summary: The bulk and surface electronic structure of MoAlB(010) is studied by a combination of angle-resolved photoemission spectroscopy and density functional calculations. The observed bulk Fermi-level crossings agree with the previously reported bulk Fermi surface of the material. Additionally, we find several surface states in the wide projected bulk band gaps around the Fermi energy. The surface states differ in their stability under residual-gas exposure in the vacuum system and in the magnitude of their Rashba-type spin-orbit splitting. We explain this in terms of their elemental and orbital character. A surface state arising from Al dangling bonds is sensitive to surface contamination, whereas a mainly Mo-derived surface state exhibits the stronger spin-orbit splitting. The surface states show symmetry-enforced crossings near the $\bar{\mathrm{S}}$ point of the surface Brillouin zone. These are protected by the mirror-symmetry elements of the p2mm wallpaper group.

AI.tldr: 通过角分辨光电子能谱和密度泛函计算，研究了MoAlB(010)的体相和表面电子结构。观测到体相费米面交叉，并在费米能级附近的投影体相带隙中发现多种表面态，这些表面态在残余气体暴露稳定性和Rashba自旋轨道分裂强度上存在差异，源于其元素和轨道特性。Al悬挂键表面态易受污染，而Mo衍生表面态自旋轨道分裂更强。表面态在表面布里渊区$\bar{\mathrm{S}}$点附近表现出对称性保护的能带交叉。
AI.motivation: 揭示MoAlB(010)表面的电子结构特性，特别是表面态的存在、稳定性、自旋轨道分裂以及对称性保护机制。
AI.method: 结合角分辨光电子能谱(ARPES)实验和密度泛函理论(DFT)计算，对MoAlB(010)的体相和表面电子结构进行综合分析。
AI.result: 发现了多种表面态，其稳定性（对残余气体暴露）和Rashba自旋轨道分裂强度不同；Al悬挂键表面态对污染敏感，Mo衍生表面态具有更强的自旋轨道分裂；表面态在$\bar{\mathrm{S}}$点附近存在受p2mm wallpaper群镜像对称性保护的能带交叉。
AI.conclusion: MoAlB(010)表面存在多种不同性质的表面态，其行为可由元素和轨道特征解释，且对称性保护机制确保了某些表面态能带交叉的稳定性。

title: A computational alloy design framework for the promotion of amorphous grain boundary complexions
summary: Amorphous grain boundary complexions have been shown to be radiation tolerant interfaces that can also reduce grain boundary embrittlement, marking them as favorable microstructural features. However, the incorporation of these features into new alloy systems is often a slow and arduous process based on trial and error. Here, a computational framework for alloy design is presented which enables the selection of dopants that promote the formation of amorphous grain boundary complexions. This framework is primarily built on density functional theory calculations and is demonstrated for W-rich binary and ternary alloys, which represent a promising target for fusion energy materials. Our framework first evaluates the grain boundary segregation tendency of dopants and then the energy penalty for amorphization alongside targeted interfacial energy comparison, with the end goal of identifying the best dopants. For a W base, Y and some transition metals such as Co and Ni are found to significantly lower these energetic barriers. Electronic structure analysis, local lattice distortion, and charge density distributions are calculated and used to provide mechanistic explanations for these dopant selections. Finally, the framework is validated by comparing with experimental literature for W alloys and a refractory complex concentrated alloy, showing a strong correlation between our dopant selections and low sintering onset temperatures that have been attributed to activated sintering. As a whole, this work establishes a transferable pipeline for designing alloys with grain-boundary complexions across diverse alloy systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于密度泛函理论计算的计算框架，用于筛选促进W基合金中非晶态晶界络合物形成的掺杂元素，并通过实验验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 非晶态晶界络合物具有耐辐射和抗脆化等优良特性，但将其引入新合金体系目前依赖试错法，过程缓慢且费力，亟需一种系统性的合金设计方法。
AI.method: 基于密度泛函理论计算，首先评估掺杂元素的晶界偏聚倾向，然后计算非晶化能量势垒并进行界面能比较，最后结合电子结构分析、局域晶格畸变和电荷密度分布提供机制解释。
AI.result: 在W基合金中，Y以及Co、Ni等过渡金属能显著降低非晶化能量势垒；掺杂剂选择与实验文献中低烧结起始温度之间存在强相关性，验证了框架的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该工作建立了一个可迁移的合金设计流程，可用于在不同合金体系中设计具有晶界络合物的合金，具有重要的工程应用价值。

title: Predicting co-segregation in multicomponent alloys with solute-solute interactions
comment: main text: 33 pages, 7 figures; Supplementary Materials (i): 6 pages, 6 figures; Supplementary Materials (ii): 20 pages, spectral dataset for 55 ternary systems
summary: The co-segregation of impurities in multicomponent alloys has been widely recognized as an effective strategy for tailoring material properties. However, quantitative predictions of co-segregation behavior remain a significant challenge for alloy design in systems containing multiple solute species. In this work, we develop an extended dual-solute (DS) segregation framework to quantitatively predict co-segregation behavior with solute-solute interactions, including both homoatomic and heteroatomic contributions. A machine-learning workflow is first established to predict the pairwise segregation energy to construct the DS segregation energy spectra that intrinsically include solute-solute interactions. The resulting spectral information is then utilized to determine the upper and lower bounds of segregation for individual solutes. When applied to magnesium-based multicomponent systems constructed by alloying Mg with any two of the 11 candidate solute species, the extended DS segregation framework is successfully validated by hybrid molecular dynamics/Monte Carlo simulations and experimental results available in existing literature. Furthermore, we introduce a design strategy to promote co-segregation by incorporating additional solute species that exhibit attractive interactions with existing solutes, thereby enabling enhanced segregation even in the presence of strong site competition. These results underscore the critical role of solute-solute interactions in governing co-segregation behavior and provide a predictive pathway for the design and optimization of multicomponent alloys.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种扩展的双溶质（DS）偏聚框架，结合机器学习预测溶质-溶质相互作用，可定量预测多组分合金中杂质的共偏聚行为，并在镁基合金系统中得到验证。
AI.motivation: 多组分合金中杂质共偏聚是调控材料性能的有效策略，但定量预测共偏聚行为仍是一大挑战，尤其是存在多种溶质物种的系统中。
AI.method: 构建了扩展的双溶质（DS）偏聚框架，包含机器学习工作流预测配对偏聚能，构建DS偏聚能谱，利用谱信息确定单个溶质的偏聚上下界。
AI.result: 在含11种候选溶质的镁基多组分合金系统中，通过混合分子动力学/蒙特卡洛模拟及文献实验数据成功验证了该框架。引入的设计策略表明，添加与现有溶质具有吸引相互作用的额外溶质物种可促进共偏聚，即使存在强位点竞争。
AI.conclusion: 溶质-溶质相互作用在共偏聚行为中起关键作用，该框架为多组分合金的设计与优化提供了可预测的路径。

title: Load-dependent Hardness Prediction for Materials using Machine Learning
summary: Superhard materials are critical for wear-resistant and high-stress applications. Conventional approaches correlating hardness with elastic moduli derived from DFT calculations enable rapid screening but overlook the strong load dependence of hardness. In this work, machine learning (ML) models were developed using a large, curated dataset of load-dependent experimental Vickers hardness (Hv) measurements. Moderate correlation was observed between experimental and DFT-based Hv values, whereas a single-task ML model trained solely on experimental data outperformed multi-task models that combined experimental and computed data. The superior performance of the single-task model highlights that explicit inclusion of indentation load, along with compositional, electronic, and structural descriptors, is essential and sufficient for accurate hardness prediction, beyond what can be achieved using DFT-accessible bulk and shear moduli alone (or in tandem with experimental data). These results emphasize the importance of high-quality experimental data and explicit inclusion of measurement conditions, particularly load, in the development of reliable hardness prediction models.

AI.tldr: 本文通过机器学习模型，利用大规模实验维氏硬度数据，证明显式包含压痕载荷以及成分、电子和结构描述符，比仅依赖DFT弹性模量能更准确预测超硬材料硬度，强调了高质量实验数据和测量条件的重要性。
AI.motivation: 传统超硬材料筛选方法依赖DFT计算的弹性模量与硬度关联，但忽略了硬度的强载荷依赖性，导致预测精度受限。
AI.method: 构建了大规模载荷依赖的实验维氏硬度数据集，分别训练单任务ML模型（仅实验数据）和多任务ML模型（实验+DFT计算数据），比较其预测性能。
AI.result: 实验与DFT硬度值仅中等相关；单任务ML模型优于多任务模型；显式包含载荷及多维度描述符是准确预测的关键。
AI.conclusion: 高质量实验数据和测量条件（尤其载荷）对开发可靠硬度预测模型至关重要，超越单纯依赖DFT弹性模量的方法。

title: Polaron transport and Verwey transition in magnetite
summary: The enigmatic puzzle of the Verwey transition in magnetite Fe$_3$O$_4$ has been unresolved for almost a century. We present an ab initio-based model of the polaron transport combining kinetic Monte Carlo and molecular dynamics calculations to directly describe the coupling of polarons with lattice vibrations. Contrary to the Ihle-Lorentz small-polaron model, we find no significant change in the band structure across the Verwey transition, however, trimeron hopping is observed. The proposed model provides dc-conductivity in agreement with experimental data across the Verwey transition.

AI.tldr: 本文通过第一性原理结合动力学蒙特卡洛和分子动力学方法，构建了极化子输运模型，揭示了磁铁矿Verwey转变中三聚体跳跃机制而非能带结构变化，成功解释了实验电导率数据。
AI.motivation: Verwey转变是磁铁矿中一个近百年未解的谜题，作者希望从第一性原理出发，直接描述极化子与晶格振动的耦合，以理解这一转变的微观机制。
AI.method: 结合动力学蒙特卡洛（kinetic Monte Carlo）和分子动力学（molecular dynamics）计算，构建基于第一性原理的极化子输运模型。
AI.result: 与Ihle-Lorentz小极化子模型相反，发现Verwey转变前后能带结构无显著变化，但观察到三聚体跳跃（trimeron hopping）现象。模型计算的直流电导率与实验数据吻合。
AI.conclusion: Verwey转变的关键机制是三聚体跳跃而非能带结构变化，所提模型能正确描述该转变的电输运性质。

title: Strain effects in [001] textured Co80Ir20 thin films with negative magnetocrystalline anisotropy
summary: Co80Ir20 ferromagnetic thin films have recently been the focus of intensive research because the negative magnetocrystalline anisotropy adds to the shape anisotropy and favors a strong alignment of the magnetization in the film plane for [001] textured or epitaxial thin films. However, the role of magnetoelastic effects has not been properly considered in most published research. In this work we have performed a detailed analysis of 24 nm Co80Ir20 thin films deposited on Si/SiO2 with different underlayers (Ta, Pt) and overlayers in order to induce [001]-textured growth and different degrees of strain. Using x-ray diffraction measurements we have found that the c-axis lattice parameter depends on the underlayer material (larger negative strain for Ta), but the degree of texture and the average grain size remain essentially constant, except for one of the multilayers. Differences in the magnetic behavior according to the underlayer were also found in room temperature magnetization vs field loops and temperature dependent dc magnetization measurements. Anisotropy was quantified using ferromagnetic resonance which showed that the effective anisotropy field is also dependent on the underlayer. Ta underlayers show an anisotropy close to that expected for shape, while Pt underlayer induces an additional in-plane anisotropy field of the order of 7-9 kOe. A simple model of stress induced anisotropy gives anisotropy field values similar to those observed experimentally. The correlation between observed strain and anisotropy together with the similarity in microstructural properties strongly suggests that stress effects cannot be disregarded when analyzing the magnetic data for the estimation of the magnetocrystalline contribution.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了Co80Ir20薄膜在不同底层（Ta, Pt）和覆盖层条件下的磁弹效应，发现底层材料引起的晶格应变会显著影响磁各向异性，其中Ta底层应变较大但各向异性接近形状各向异性，而Pt底层引入约7-9 kOe的额外面内各向异性场，表明磁弹效应在分析磁晶各向异性贡献时不可忽略。
AI.motivation: Co80Ir20铁磁薄膜因其负磁晶各向异性与形状各向异性叠加，有利于[001]取向薄膜的面内磁化排列，但已有研究大多忽略了磁弹效应的影响。本文旨在填补这一空白，系统探究磁弹效应在该体系中的作用。
AI.method: 制备24 nm Co80Ir20薄膜沉积于Si/SiO2基底，采用不同底层（Ta, Pt）和覆盖层诱导[001]织构生长和不同应变程度；通过X射线衍射测量晶格参数，结合室温磁滞回线、温度依赖直流磁化测量以及铁磁共振定量表征各向异性场，并与应力诱导各向异性的简化模型进行对比。
AI.result: Ta底层引入较大的负应变，但各向异性接近纯形状各向异性；Pt底层则引入约7-9 kOe的额外面内各向异性场。微观结构（织构度、平均晶粒尺寸）基本保持恒定。应力模型给出的各向异性场值与实验结果吻合。
AI.conclusion: 观察到的应变与各向异性之间的相关性，结合微观结构的高度相似性，有力地证明在分析磁数据以估算磁晶各向异性贡献时，应力效应不可被忽略。

title: Engineering Wake-Up-Free Ferroelectric Capacitors with Enhanced High-Temperature Reliability
summary: We systematically explore the design space of ferroelectric hafnium-zirconium oxide (H0.5Z0.5O or HZO) heterostructures for reliable high temperature operation. HZO films are deposited using thermal and plasma-enhanced atomic layer deposition (Th-ALD and PE-ALD) on tungsten (W) and titanium nitride (TiN) bottom electrodes (BE), while maintaining identical top electrodes. We demonstrate that PE-ALD HZO capacitors integrated with W BE exhibit wake-up-free switching up to 125C, along with significantly improved endurance compared to Th-ALD HZO/W devices across a wide temperature range (85-125C). By decoupling the contributions of the plasma-deposited HZO film and the oxidized bottom interface inherently formed during PE-ALD, we identify the oxidized W interfacial layer (WOx) as the primary factor governing endurance enhancement and wake-up suppression at elevated temperatures, while the PE-ALD HZO film provides secondary benefits in reducing wake-up. In contrast, PE-ALD HZO capacitors fabricated on TiN BE show no substantial improvement in wake-up behavior or endurance relative to Th-ALD HZO/TiN devices, despite the formation of an unintentional TiOxNy interfacial layer, and instead exhibit degraded polarization. This difference arises from the significantly weaker endurance enhancement and no wake-up suppression provided by oxidized TiN compared to oxidized W under comparable oxidation conditions. Overall, PE-ALD HZO films enable superior ferroelectric performance at elevated temperatures only when deposited on W BE, while Th-ALD HZO films remain a viable option for high temperature operation on TiN BE. These findings clarify the interplay between deposition technique, electrode chemistry, and interfacial oxidation, and provide design guidelines for integrating ferroelectric memories into monolithic 3D systems under stringent thermal constraints.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了基于HZO铁电异质结构的高温可靠性设计空间，发现PE-ALD HZO与W底电极结合可实现免唤醒、高耐久的铁电性能（最高125°C），而关键增强机制归因于PE-ALD过程中形成的WOx氧化界面层，而非HZO薄膜本身。
AI.motivation: 铁电存储器在单片3D集成中面临高温工作可靠性的挑战，HZO材料虽具潜力，但不同沉积工艺与电极材料组合下的高温性能退化机制尚不明确，亟需系统设计空间探索。
AI.method: 采用热ALD和等离子体增强ALD两种工艺在W和TiN两种底电极上沉积HZO薄膜，保持顶电极一致；通过解耦等离子体沉积的HZO薄膜与PE-ALD过程中形成的氧化界面层，分别评估其对高温铁电性能的贡献。
AI.result: PE-ALD HZO/W器件在125°C下实现免唤醒切换，并在85-125°C范围内耐久性显著优于Th-ALD HZO/W器件；PE-ALD HZO/TiN器件则未表现出改善，反而极化退化。WOx界面层是性能提升的主因，PE-ALD HZO薄膜仅对降低唤醒效应有次要贡献。
AI.conclusion: PE-ALD HZO仅在W底电极上才能实现优异的高温铁电性能，而Th-ALD HZO/TiN仍是高温应用的可行方案。研究阐明了沉积工艺、电极化学与界面氧化之间的协同机制，为单片3D系统热约束下的铁电存储器集成提供了设计准则。

title: Anisotropic multiband magnetotransport in LaAg$_2$Ge$_2$ thin films
summary: ThCr$_2$Si$_2$-type intermetallics are layered conductors in which crystallographic anisotropy and multiband electronic states often give rise to characteristic magnetotransport phenomena. Here, we report the molecular-beam epitaxy growth of LaAg$_2$Ge$_2$ thin films on MgO(001) and their magnetotransport properties. The Hall effect and magnetoresistance are captured by an effective two-carrier description with a high-mobility electron band, yielding a positive magnetoresistance of 22.5% at 9 T. Angle-dependent magnetoresistance exhibits a dominant twofold anisotropy and additional reproducible dip/peak features at characteristic tilt angles that are nearly independent of field and temperature. These results extend our understanding of the anisotropic electronic transport in thin-film germanides within the ThCr$_2$Si$_2$ family.

AI.tldr: 本文报道了ThCr₂Si₂型层状金属间化合物LaAg₂Ge₂薄膜的分子束外延生长及其磁输运性质，揭示了双载流子电导机制和角度依赖的磁阻各向异性。
AI.motivation: ThCr₂Si₂型金属间化合物因晶体各向异性和多带电子态导致独特的磁输运现象，但此前对这类锗化物薄膜的研究尚不充分，需要拓展理解。
AI.method: 采用分子束外延技术在MgO(001)衬底上生长LaAg₂Ge₂薄膜，并通过霍尔效应、磁阻测量及角度依赖磁阻分析来表征其电输运特性。
AI.result: 有效双载流子模型（含高迁移率电子带）能很好地描述霍尔效应和磁阻数据，在9 T下获得22.5%的正磁阻；角度依赖磁阻呈现主控的二重对称性以及特征倾角处可重复的凹/尖峰特征，这些特征几乎不依赖场强和温度。
AI.conclusion: 该工作拓展了对ThCr₂Si₂族锗化物薄膜中各向异性电子输运的理解。
